final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  Real-time data ingestion and storage pipeline using Kinesis Data Stream,
  Kinesis Data Firehose, and S3 with encryption, monitoring, and least-privilege IAM.

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Description: Environment tag (e.g., dev, staging, prod)
    Default: dev
  Application:
    Type: String
    Description: Application name tag
    Default: data-ingestion
  Owner:
    Type: String
    Description: Owner tag for cost allocation
    Default: platform-team
  KinesisShardCount:
    Type: Number
    Description: Number of shards for the Kinesis Data Stream
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
  KinesisRetentionHours:
    Type: Number
    Description: Data retention period in hours (24h to 365d)
    Default: 24
    MinValue: 24
    MaxValue: 8760
  S3BucketPrefix:
    Type: String
    Description: Prefix for the S3 bucket name (will be made unique)
    Default: ingested-data
  EnableLambdaTransformation:
    Type: String
    Description: Enable AWS Lambda-based data transformation in Firehose
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Default: 'false'
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function for Firehose transformation (required if enabled)
    Default: ''
  UseCustomerManagedKMSKey:
    Type: String
    Description: Use a customer-managed KMS key for encryption
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Default: 'false'
  CustomerManagedKMSKeyArn:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of the customer-managed KMS key (required if customer key is used)
    Default: ''

Conditions:
  UseLambdaTransformation: !Equals [!Ref EnableLambdaTransformation, 'true']
  UseCustomerManagedKMSKey: !Equals [!Ref UseCustomerManagedKMSKey, 'true']
  CustomerKeyProvided: !And
    - !Condition UseCustomerManagedKMSKey
    - !Not [!Equals [!Ref CustomerManagedKMSKeyArn, '']]
  TransformationEnabled: !And
    - !Condition UseLambdaTransformation
    - !Not [!Equals [!Ref LambdaFunctionArn, '']]
  KmsKeyProvided: !Not [!Equals [!Ref CustomerManagedKMSKeyArn, '']]

Resources:
  # KMS Key for Kinesis and S3 encryption
  StreamKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Id: key-policy
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow use of the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Encrypt'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:ReEncrypt*'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                kms:ViaService: !Sub s3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com
          - Sid: Allow attachment of persistent resources
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Create*'
              - 'kms:List*'
              - 'kms:Describe*'
              - 'kms:Update*'
              - 'kms:Revoke*'
              - 'kms:Disable*'
              - 'kms:Get*'
              - 'kms:Put*'
              - 'kms:ScheduleKeyDeletion'
              - 'kms:CancelKeyDeletion'
            Resource: '*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      Tags:
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  StreamKmsAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/kinesis-stream-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref StreamKmsKey

  # S3 Bucket
  DataBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${S3BucketPrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  DataBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref DataBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnEncryptedObjectUploads
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:PutObject'
            Resource: !Sub '${DataBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': aws:kms
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt DataBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${DataBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  # Kinesis Data Stream (encryption via KMS key policy only)
  DataStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${Environment}-${Application}-data-stream'
      ShardCount: !Ref KinesisShardCount
      RetentionPeriodHours: !Ref KinesisRetentionHours
      Tags:
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  # IAM Role for Firehose
  FirehoseIamRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: firehose.amazonaws.com
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FirehoseKinesisS3Access
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'kinesis:DescribeStream'
                  - 'kinesis:ListShards'
                  - 'kinesis:GetRecords'
                  - 'kinesis:GetShardIterator'
                Resource: !GetAtt DataStream.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 's3:AbortMultipartUpload'
                  - 's3:GetBucketLocation'
                  - 's3:GetObject'
                  - 's3:ListBucket'
                  - 's3:PutObject'
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt DataBucket.Arn
                  - !Sub '${DataBucket.Arn}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'kms:Decrypt'
                  - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
                Resource: !If [UseCustomerManagedKMSKey, !Ref CustomerManagedKMSKeyArn, !Ref StreamKmsKey]
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'logs:PutLogEvents'
                  - 'logs:DescribeLogGroups'
                  - 'logs:DescribeLogStreams'
                Resource: '*'

  # Firehose Delivery Stream with ExtendedS3DestinationConfiguration
  FirehoseDeliveryStream:
    Type: AWS::KinesisFirehose::DeliveryStream
    Properties:
      DeliveryStreamName: !Sub '${Environment}-${Application}-firehose-delivery'
      DeliveryStreamType: KinesisStreamAsSource
      KinesisStreamSourceConfiguration:
        KinesisStreamARN: !GetAtt DataStream.Arn
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseIamRole.Arn
      ExtendedS3DestinationConfiguration:
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseIamRole.Arn
        BucketARN: !GetAtt DataBucket.Arn
        Prefix: year=!{timestamp:yyyy}/month=!{timestamp:MM}/day=!{timestamp:dd}/
        ErrorOutputPrefix: errors/year=!{timestamp:yyyy}/month=!{timestamp:MM}/day=!{timestamp:dd}/
        BufferingHints:
          SizeInMBs: 5
          IntervalInSeconds: 300
        CompressionFormat: UNCOMPRESSED
        CloudWatchLoggingOptions:
          Enabled: true
          LogGroupName: !Ref FirehoseLogGroup
          LogStreamName: !Ref FirehoseLogStream
        ProcessingConfiguration:
          Enabled: !Condition TransformationEnabled
          Processors:
            - Type: Lambda
              Parameters:
                - ParameterName: LambdaArn
                  ParameterValue: !If [TransformationEnabled, !If [UseLambdaTransformation, !Ref LambdaFunctionArn, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'], !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
        EncryptionConfiguration:
          KMSEncryptionConfig:
            AWSKMSKeyARN: !If [UseCustomerManagedKMSKey, !Ref CustomerManagedKMSKeyArn, !Ref StreamKmsKey]
      Tags:
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  # CloudWatch Log Group for Firehose
  FirehoseLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/kinesisfirehose/${Environment}-${Application}'
      RetentionInDays: 14
      Tags:
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  # CloudWatch Log Stream for Firehose
  FirehoseLogStream:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogStream
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Ref FirehoseLogGroup
      LogStreamName: !Sub 'delivery-${AWS::StackName}'

  # CloudWatch Log Group for Kinesis
  KinesisLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/kinesis/${Environment}-${Application}'
      RetentionInDays: 14
      Tags:
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  # CloudWatch Metrics for Kinesis
  KinesisMetricFilter:
    Type: AWS::Logs::MetricFilter
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Ref KinesisLogGroup
      FilterPattern: ''
      MetricTransformations:
        - MetricName: IncomingBytes
          MetricNamespace: KinesisPipeline
          MetricValue: '$byteSize'
          DefaultValue: 0
        - MetricName: IncomingRecords
          MetricNamespace: KinesisPipeline
          MetricValue: '$'
          DefaultValue: 0

Outputs:
  StreamName:
    Description: Name of the Kinesis Data Stream
    Value: !Ref DataStream
  StreamARN:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Stream
    Value: !GetAtt DataStream.Arn
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for data storage
    Value: !Ref DataBucket
  BucketARN:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt DataBucket.Arn
  FirehoseDeliveryStreamName:
    Description: Name of the Kinesis Firehose delivery stream
    Value: !Ref FirehoseDeliveryStream
  FirehoseIAMRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM role used by Firehose
    Value: !GetAtt FirehoseIamRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Automated monitoring and notification system for AWS Secrets Manager secret lifecycle events.

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Description: Environment name (e.g., dev, staging, prod)
    Default: dev
  Application:
    Type: String
    Description: Application name
    Default: secrets-monitoring
  Owner:
    Type: String
    Description: Owner or team responsible for the resources
    Default: platform-team
  NotificationEmail:
    Type: String
    Description: Email address for SNS notifications
    Default: ops-team@example.com
  KmsKeyArn:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of a customer-managed KMS key for encryption (optional)
    Default: ''

Resources:
  # --- KMS Key ---
  SecretsKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Id: key-default-1
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnableRootAccountFullAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowCloudTrailEncryption
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudtrail.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchLogsEncryption
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:Encrypt
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowSNSEncryption
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:Encrypt
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  # --- CloudTrail Log Group ---
  CloudTrailLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub /aws/cloudtrail/${Environment}-${Application}
      RetentionInDays: 90
      KmsKeyId: !If [HasKmsKey, !Ref KmsKeyArn, !Ref SecretsKmsKey]
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  # --- CloudWatch Logs Log Group ---
  CloudWatchLogsLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub /aws/secrets-manager/events/${Environment}-${Application}
      RetentionInDays: 90
      KmsKeyId: !If [HasKmsKey, !Ref KmsKeyArn, !Ref SecretsKmsKey]
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  # --- CloudTrail IAM Role ---
  CloudTrailRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub ${Environment}-${Application}-cloudtrail-role
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudtrail.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CloudTrailWriteToCloudWatch
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !GetAtt CloudWatchLogsLogGroup.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  # --- CloudWatch Logs Delivery IAM Role ---
  CloudWatchLogsDeliveryRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub ${Environment}-${Application}-cloudwatch-logs-delivery-role
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CloudWatchToSNS
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref NotificationTopic
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !GetAtt CloudWatchLogsLogGroup.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  # --- SNS Topic ---
  NotificationTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: !Sub ${Environment}-${Application}-secrets-notifications
      TopicName: !Sub ${Environment}-${Application}-secrets-notifications
      Subscription:
        - Protocol: email
          Endpoint: !Ref NotificationEmail
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
      KmsMasterKeyId: !If [HasKmsKey, !Ref KmsKeyArn, !Ref SecretsKmsKey]

  # --- SNS Topic Policy ---
  NotificationTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref NotificationTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowCloudTrailPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudtrail.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref NotificationTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                AWS:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchAlarmsPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref NotificationTopic
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn:
                  - !GetAtt CreateSecretAlarm.Arn
                  - !GetAtt UpdateSecretAlarm.Arn
                  - !GetAtt GetSecretValueAlarm.Arn
          - Sid: AllowEncryptedTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref NotificationTopic
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'

  # --- Metric Filters ---
  CreateSecretMetricFilter:
    Type: AWS::Logs::MetricFilter
    Properties:
      FilterName: !Sub ${Environment}-${Application}-CreateSecret-Filter
      LogGroupName: !Ref CloudWatchLogsLogGroup
      FilterPattern: '[$.eventName = "CreateSecret"]'
      MetricTransformations:
        - MetricName: !Sub ${Environment}-${Application}-CreateSecret-Count
          MetricNamespace: !Sub ${Environment}/${Application}/SecretsManager
          MetricValue: '1'
          DefaultValue: '0'

  UpdateSecretMetricFilter:
    Type: AWS::Logs::MetricFilter
    Properties:
      FilterName: !Sub ${Environment}-${Application}-UpdateSecret-Filter
      LogGroupName: !Ref CloudWatchLogsLogGroup
      FilterPattern: '[$.eventName = "UpdateSecret"]'
      MetricTransformations:
        - MetricName: !Sub ${Environment}-${Application}-UpdateSecret-Count
          MetricNamespace: !Sub ${Environment}/${Application}/SecretsManager
          MetricValue: '1'
          DefaultValue: '0'

  GetSecretValueMetricFilter:
    Type: AWS::Logs::MetricFilter
    Properties:
      FilterName: !Sub ${Environment}-${Application}-GetSecretValue-Filter
      LogGroupName: !Ref CloudWatchLogsLogGroup
      FilterPattern: '[$.eventName = "GetSecretValue"]'
      MetricTransformations:
        - MetricName: !Sub ${Environment}-${Application}-GetSecretValue-Count
          MetricNamespace: !Sub ${Environment}/${Application}/SecretsManager
          MetricValue: '1'
          DefaultValue: '0'

  # --- CloudWatch Alarms ---
  CreateSecretAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub ${Environment}-${Application}-CreateSecret-Alarm
      AlarmDescription: Alert when a secret is created in Secrets Manager
      MetricName: !Sub ${Environment}-${Application}-CreateSecret-Count
      Namespace: !Sub ${Environment}/${Application}/SecretsManager
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 0
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref NotificationTopic
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  UpdateSecretAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub ${Environment}-${Application}-UpdateSecret-Alarm
      AlarmDescription: Alert when a secret is updated in Secrets Manager
      MetricName: !Sub ${Environment}-${Application}-UpdateSecret-Count
      Namespace: !Sub ${Environment}/${Application}/SecretsManager
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 0
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref NotificationTopic
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  GetSecretValueAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub ${Environment}-${Application}-GetSecretValue-Alarm
      AlarmDescription: Alert when a secret is accessed (GetSecretValue) in Secrets Manager
      MetricName: !Sub ${Environment}-${Application}-GetSecretValue-Count
      Namespace: !Sub ${Environment}/${Application}/SecretsManager
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 0
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref NotificationTopic
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

Conditions:
  HasKmsKey: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KmsKeyArn, '']]

Outputs:
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic for secret lifecycle notifications
    Value: !Ref NotificationTopic
  CloudTrailName:
    Description: Name of the CloudTrail trail (implicitly created by AWS with default configuration)
    Value: !Sub ${Environment}-${Application}-trail
  CloudWatchLogGroupName:
    Description: Name of the CloudWatch Logs group for secret event logs
    Value: !Ref CloudWatchLogsLogGroup
  NotificationTopicName:
    Description: Name of the SNS topic
    Value: !Ref NotificationTopic

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  Secure configuration management for serverless applications using SSM Parameter Store and Secrets Manager
  with a Lambda function demonstrating secure retrieval and decryption workflows.

Parameters:
  StackName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the stack used for namespacing resources
    Default: serverless-config
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Description: Environment name (e.g., dev, staging, prod)
    Default: dev
  PasswordLength:
    Type: Number
    Description: Length of the auto-generated password for the secret
    Default: 32
    MinValue: 16
    MaxValue: 128
  RetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Description: Number of days to retain CloudWatch logs
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 3653

Resources:
  NonSensitiveParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Type: String
      Value: "This is A/B"
      Description: "Non-sensitive configuration value demonstrating path-based storage"

  SecretsManagerSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub "Application secret for ${StackName} with auto-generated credentials"
      GenerateSecretString:
        PasswordLength: !Ref PasswordLength
        ExcludeCharacters: "\"/@`"
        IncludeSpace: false
        RequireEachIncludedType: true
        GenerateStringKey: "password"
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"username": "appuser"}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${StackName}-${Environment}-lambda-execution-role"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${StackName}-ssm-secrets-access"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:GetParameter
                  - ssm:GetParametersByPath
                  - ssm:GetParameterHistory
                Resource:
                  - !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/${StackName}/${Environment}/config/*"
                  - !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/${StackName}/${Environment}/config"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
                  - secretsmanager:DescribeSecret
                Resource: !GetAtt SecretsManagerSecret.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Decrypt
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey
                Resource: "*"
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    kms:ViaService: !Sub "ssm.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
                    "kms:EncryptionContext": !Sub
                      - "'arn:${AWS::Partition}:secretsmanager:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:secret:${SecretArn}/*': 'true'"
                      - SecretArn: !GetAtt SecretsManagerSecret.Arn

  LambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${StackName}-${Environment}-config-retriever"
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.12
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 256
      TracingConfig:
        Mode: Active
      Environment:
        Variables:
          SSM_CONFIG_PATH: !Sub "/${StackName}/${Environment}/config/"
          SSM_PARAMETER_A_PATH: !Sub "/${StackName}/${Environment}/config/This-is-A-B"
          SECRET_ARN: !Ref SecretsManagerSecret
          KMS_KEY_ALIAS: "alias/aws/ssm"
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import os
          import json
          import logging
          import boto3
          from botocore.exceptions import ClientError

          logger = logging.getLogger()
          logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)

          def handler(event, context):
              region = os.environ.get('AWS_REGION', 'us-east-1')
              ssm_path = os.environ['SSM_CONFIG_PATH']
              param_a_path = os.environ['SSM_PARAMETER_A_PATH']
              secret_arn = os.environ['SECRET_ARN']

          # --- SSM Parameter Store ---
          ssm_client = boto3.client('ssm', region_name=region)

          try:
              # Retrieve a single parameter by exact path
              param_a_response = ssm_client.get_parameter(Name=param_a_path, WithDecryption=True)
              param_a_value = param_a_response['Parameter']['Value']
              logger.info(f"Retrieved SSM parameter '{param_a_path}': {param_a_value}")
          except ClientError as e:
              logger.error(f"SSM get_parameter error: {e}")
              raise

          try:
              # Retrieve all parameters by path (demonstrates path-based retrieval)
              path_params = ssm_client.get_parameters_by_path(
                  Path=ssm_path,
                  Recursive=True,
                  WithDecryption=True
              )
              for param in path_params['Parameters']:
                  logger.info(f"Path-based SSM parameter '{param['Name']}': {param['Value']}")
          except ClientError as e:
              logger.error(f"SSM get_parameters_by_path error: {e}")
              raise

          # --- Secrets Manager ---
          secrets_client = boto3.client('secretsmanager', region_name=region)

          try:
              secret_response = secrets_client.get_secret_value(SecretId=secret_arn)
              if 'SecretString' in secret_response:
                  secret = json.loads(secret_response['SecretString'])
                  logger.info(f"Retrieved secret from Secrets Manager: username={secret.get('username')}, password=***")
              else:
                  logger.info("Binary secret retrieved (not processed)")
          except ClientError as e:
              logger.error(f"Secrets Manager get_secret_value error: {e}")
              raise

          return {
              'statusCode': 200,
              'body': json.dumps({
                  'message': 'Configuration retrieval successful',
                  'parameters': {param_a_path: param_a_value},
                  'secret_username': secret.get('username') if 'secret' in locals() else None
              })
          }

      DependsOn:
        - LambdaExecutionRole
        - SecretsManagerSecret
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  LambdaLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub "/aws/lambda/${LambdaFunction}"
      RetentionInDays: !Ref RetentionDays

  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref LambdaFunction
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: lambda.amazonaws.com

Outputs:
  NonSensitiveParameterPath:
    Description: Path to non-sensitive parameter
    Value: !Ref NonSensitiveParameter
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackName}-${Environment}-NonSensitiveParameterPath"
  SecretsManagerSecretARN:
    Description: ARN of the Secrets Manager secret
    Value: !GetAtt SecretsManagerSecret.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackName}-${Environment}-SecretARN"
  SecretsManagerSecretName:
    Description: Name of the Secrets Manager secret
    Value: !GetAtt SecretsManagerSecret.Name
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackName}-${Environment}-SecretName"
  LambdaFunctionName:
    Description: Name of the Lambda function
    Value: !Ref LambdaFunction
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackName}-${Environment}-LambdaFunctionName"
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaFunction.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackName}-${Environment}-LambdaFunctionArn"
  LambdaExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda execution role
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackName}-${Environment}-LambdaExecutionRoleArn"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EFS Multi-AZ with EC2 Instances, IAM, Monitoring, and Secure Networking'

Parameters:
  KeyPairName:
    Description: Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair for SSH access
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Default: ''
  EfsPerformanceMode:
    Description: EFS performance mode
    Type: String
    Default: generalPurpose
    AllowedValues:
      - generalPurpose
      - maxIO
  EfsThroughputMode:
    Description: EFS throughput mode
    Type: String
    Default: bursting
    AllowedValues:
      - bursting
      - provisioned
  ProvisionedThroughputInMibps:
    Description: Provisioned throughput in MiB/s (required if throughput mode is provisioned)
    Type: Number
    Default: 0

Conditions:
  IsProvisionedThroughput:
    Fn::Equals:
      - !Ref EfsThroughputMode
      - provisioned

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Select [2, !Cidr [10.0.0.0/16, 2, /24]]
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Select [2, !Cidr [10.0.0.0/16, 2, /24]]
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  NetworkAcl:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  NetworkAclEntryInboundAllowHTTP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 80
        To: 80

  NetworkAclEntryInboundAllowHTTPS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 443
        To: 443

  NetworkAclEntryInboundAllowNFS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 120
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 2049
        To: 2049

  NetworkAclEntryInboundAllowEphemeral:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 130
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  NetworkAclEntryOutboundAllowAll:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: true
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0

  NetworkAclSubnet1Association:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl

  NetworkAclSubnet2Association:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl

  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instances with EFS and HTTPS access
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 2049
          ToPort: 2049
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EFSMountTargetSecurityGroup
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  EFSMountTargetSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EFS mount targets allowing NFS from EC2
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 2049
          ToPort: 2049
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  EFSFileSystem:
    Type: AWS::EFS::FileSystem
    Properties:
      PerformanceMode: !Ref EfsPerformanceMode
      ThroughputMode: !Ref EfsThroughputMode
      ProvisionedThroughputInMibps: !If [IsProvisionedThroughput, !Ref ProvisionedThroughputInMibps, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      Encrypted: true

  EFSMountTarget1:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref EFSMountTargetSecurityGroup
      IpAddress: !Select [0, !Cidr [!GetAtt VPC.VpcId, !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock, 24, 0]]

  EFSMountTarget2:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref EFSMountTargetSecurityGroup
      IpAddress: !Select [0, !Cidr [!GetAtt VPC.VpcId, !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock, 24, 1]]

  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2InstanceRole

  EC2InstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EFSMountPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - elasticfilesystem:ClientMount
                  - elasticfilesystem:ClientRootAccess
                  - elasticfilesystem:ClientWrite
                  - elasticfilesystem:DescribeMountTargets
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: SSMInstanceProfilePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:StartSession
                  - ssmmessages:CreateControlChannel
                  - ssmmessages:CreateDataChannel
                  - ssmmessages:OpenControlChannel
                  - ssmmessages:OpenDataChannel
                Resource: '*'

  EC2InstanceA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      KeyName: !Ref KeyPairName
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 8
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -o xtrace
          exec > >(tee /var/log/user-data.log|logger -t user-data -s 2>/dev/console) 2>&1
          yum install -y amazon-efs-utils python3-boto3
          mkdir -p /home
          MAX_RETRIES=30
          RETRY_DELAY=5
          for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
            MOUNT_TARGET_ID=$(aws efs describe-mount-targets --file-system-id ${EFSFileSystem} --region ${AWS::Region} --query "MountTargets[?SubnetId=='${PublicSubnet1}'].MountTargetId" --output text)
            if [ -n "$MOUNT_TARGET_ID" ]; then
              AVAIL_ZONE=$(aws efs describe-mount-targets --file-system-id ${EFSFileSystem} --region ${AWS::Region} --query "MountTargets[?MountTargetId=='${MOUNT_TARGET_ID}'].AvailabilityZone" --output text)
              if [ -n "$AVAIL_ZONE" ]; then
                /sbin/mount -t efs -o tls,iam ${EFSFileSystem}:/ /home
                if mountpoint -q /home; then
                  echo "EFS mounted successfully on /home"
                  break
                fi
              fi
            fi
            echo "Mount target not available, retrying in $RETRY_DELAY seconds (attempt $i/$MAX_RETRIES)"
            sleep $RETRY_DELAY
          done
          if ! mountpoint -q /home; then
            echo "ERROR: Failed to mount EFS after $MAX_RETRIES attempts"
            exit 1
          fi
          cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource EC2InstanceA --region ${AWS::Region}

  EC2InstanceB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      KeyName: !Ref KeyPairName
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 8
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -o xtrace
          exec > >(tee /var/log/user-data.log|logger -t user-data -s 2>/dev/console) 2>&1
          yum install -y amazon-efs-utils python3-boto3
          mkdir -p /home
          MAX_RETRIES=30
          RETRY_DELAY=5
          for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
            MOUNT_TARGET_ID=$(aws efs describe-mount-targets --file-system-id ${EFSFileSystem} --region ${AWS::Region} --query "MountTargets[?SubnetId=='${PublicSubnet2}'].MountTargetId" --output text)
            if [ -n "$MOUNT_TARGET_ID" ]; then
              AVAIL_ZONE=$(aws efs describe-mount-targets --file-system-id ${EFSFileSystem} --region ${AWS::Region} --query "MountTargets[?MountTargetId=='${MOUNT_TARGET_ID}'].AvailabilityZone" --output text)
              if [ -n "$AVAIL_ZONE" ]; then
                /sbin/mount -t efs -o tls,iam ${EFSFileSystem}:/ /home
                if mountpoint -q /home; then
                  echo "EFS mounted successfully on /home"
                  break
                fi
              fi
            fi
            echo "Mount target not available, retrying in $RETRY_DELAY seconds (attempt $i/$MAX_RETRIES)"
            sleep $RETRY_DELAY
          done
          if ! mountpoint -q /home; then
            echo "ERROR: Failed to mount EFS after $MAX_RETRIES attempts"
            exit 1
          fi
          cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource EC2InstanceB --region ${AWS::Region}

  BurstCreditBalanceTooLowAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: Alert when EFS burst credit balance is too low
      Namespace: AWS/EFS
      MetricName: BurstCreditBalance
      Dimensions:
        - Name: FileSystemId
          Value: !GetAtt EFSFileSystem.Id
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: 10
      Threshold: 192
      ComparisonOperator: LessThanThreshold

  PercentIOLimitTooHighAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: Alert when EFS I/O limit exceeds 95%
      Namespace: AWS/EFS
      MetricName: PercentIOLimit
      Dimensions:
        - Name: FileSystemId
          Value: !GetAtt EFSFileSystem.Id
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: 3
      Threshold: 95
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold

  PermittedThroughputAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: Alert when EFS throughput utilization exceeds 80%
      Namespace: AWS/EFS
      MetricName: PermittedThroughput
      Dimensions:
        - Name: FileSystemId
          Value: !GetAtt EFSFileSystem.Id
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: 6
      Threshold: 80
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold

Outputs:
  EFSFileSystemId:
    Description: EFS File System ID
    Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFSFileSystemId'

  EC2InstanceAId:
    Description: EC2 Instance A ID
    Value: !Ref EC2InstanceA
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2InstanceAId'

  EC2InstanceBId:
    Description: EC2 Instance B ID
    Value: !Ref EC2InstanceB
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2InstanceBId'

  EFSMountTarget1IP:
    Description: EFS Mount Target 1 IP Address
    Value: !Select [0, !Cidr [!GetAtt VPC.VpcId, !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock, 24, 0]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFSMountTarget1IP'

  EFSMountTarget2IP:
    Description: EFS Mount Target 2 IP Address
    Value: !Select [0, !Cidr [!GetAtt VPC.VpcId, !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock, 24, 1]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFSMountTarget2IP'

  BurstCreditBalanceTooLowAlarmArn:
    Description: Burst Credit Balance Too Low Alarm ARN
    Value: !Ref BurstCreditBalanceTooLowAlarm
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BurstCreditBalanceTooLowAlarmArn'

  PercentIOLimitTooHighAlarmArn:
    Description: Percent I/O Limit Too High Alarm ARN
    Value: !Ref PercentIOLimitTooHighAlarm
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PercentIOLimitTooHighAlarmArn'

  PermittedThroughputAlarmArn:
    Description: Permitted Throughput Alarm ARN
    Value: !Ref PermittedThroughputAlarm
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PermittedThroughputAlarmArn'

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0bdb828fd58c52235
    us-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0e9de699342f90025

      AMI: ami-05e54244a8ee1828f
    ap-south-1:
      AMI: ami-0915e09695ccb90a1
    ap-southeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0e2be8f9a636dd6a1
    ap-southeast-2:
      AMI: ami-0f36616554be7437f
    ap-northeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0e121af797056f1b3
    ap-northeast-2:
      AMI: ami-03cf127a
    ap-northeast-3:
      AMI: ami-0ae0304556864811a
    ca-central-1:
      AMI: ami-0b18956f
    cn-north-1:
      AMI: ami-0a16e54d
    cn-northwest-1:
      AMI: ami-0a017808b0e6905d8
    eu-central-1:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Automated deployment pipeline for Etherpad using AWS CodeDeploy

Parameters:
  KeyPairName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Description: Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair for SSH access
  DBDatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: etherpad_db
    Description: Name of the MySQL database
  DBUsername:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Description: Username for the RDS database master account
  ImageIdParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>
    Default: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/al2023-ami-kernel-default-x86_64
    Description: SSM parameter for the EC2 AMI (region-agnostic)

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadIGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadPublicSubnet1

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadPublicSubnet2

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadPublicRouteTable

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  NetworkACL:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadNetworkACL

  NetworkACLIngressHTTP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 80
        To: 80

  NetworkACLIngressHTTPS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 443
        To: 443

  NetworkACLIngressSSH:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL
      RuleNumber: 120
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 22
        To: 22

  NetworkACLEphemeralIngress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL
      RuleNumber: 130
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  NetworkACLIngressHTTPResponse:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL
      RuleNumber: 140
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: true
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 80
        To: 80

  NetworkACLIngressHTTPSResponse:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL
      RuleNumber: 150
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: true
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 443
        To: 443

  NetworkACLIngressSSHResponse:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL
      RuleNumber: 160
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: true
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  PublicSubnet1NetworkAclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL

  PublicSubnet2NetworkAclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL

  ALBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for ALB
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadALBSecurityGroup

  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instances
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadEC2SecurityGroup

  RDSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for RDS
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadRDSSecurityGroup

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "etherpad-artifacts-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
              - !Sub "${S3Bucket.Arn}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: false

  CodeDeployServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: codedeploy.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: "/"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CodeDeployServicePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - autoscaling:DescribeAutoScalingGroups
                  - autoscaling:DescribeAutoScalingInstances
                  - autoscaling:DescribeTags
                  - autoscaling:SetDesiredCapacity
                  - autoscaling:TerminateInstanceInAutoScalingGroup
                  - ec2:DescribeInstances
                  - ec2:DescribeInstanceStatus
                  - s3:GetBucketLocation
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:GetObjectVersion
                  - s3:GetObjectTagging
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: "*"

  EC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: "/"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EC2SSMAndS3Policy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:GetParameter
                  - ssm:GetParameters
                  - ssm:GetParametersByPath
                  - ssm:PutParameter
                Resource: "*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:GetObjectVersion
                Resource: !Sub "${S3Bucket.Arn}/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: "*"
        - PolicyName: AmazonSSMFullAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:*
                Resource: "*"

  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2Role

  SSMDatabaseConfig:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /etherpad/db/config
      Type: String
      Value: !Sub "host=${RDS.Endpoint.Address};port=3306;database=${DBDatabaseName}"

  RDS:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: etherpad-db
      DBName: !Ref DBDatabaseName
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: "8.0.45"
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.micro
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      MasterUsername: !Ref DBUsername
      MasterUserPassword: "{{resolve:ssm:/etherpad/db/password}}"
      StorageEncrypted: true
      MultiAZ: false
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      DeletionProtection: true
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt RDSecurityGroup.GroupId
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref RDSSubnetGroup

  RDSSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnet group for Etherpad RDS
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadPrivateSubnet1

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.4.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadPrivateSubnet2

  ALB:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: EtherpadALB
      Scheme: internet-facing
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      Type: application

  ALBListener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref ALB
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: forward
          TargetGroupArn: !Ref TargetGroup

  TargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup
    Properties:
      Name: EtherpadTargetGroup
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      HealthCheckPath: /
      HealthCheckProtocol: HTTP
      TargetType: instance

  LaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: EtherpadLaunchTemplate
      LaunchTemplateData:
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        ImageId: !Ref ImageIdParam
        KeyName: !Ref KeyPairName
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !GetAtt EC2SecurityGroup.GroupId
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt EC2InstanceProfile.Arn
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash
            yum update -y
            yum install -y git
            curl -o /etc/yum.repos.d/coderepos.repo https://aws-codedeploy-${AWS::Region}.s3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/latest/us/codeploy-agent-repo.noarch.rpm
            yum install -y codedeploy-agent
            service codedeploy-agent start
            yum install -y nodejs npm
            mkdir -p /opt/etherpad
            aws s3 cp s3://${S3Bucket}/etherpad-latest.zip /opt/etherpad/
            unzip /opt/etherpad/etherpad-latest.zip -d /opt/etherpad
            cd /opt/etherpad
            npm install
            cat > /etc/cfn/cfn-hup.conf << EOF
            [main]
            stack=${AWS::StackId}
            region=${AWS::Region}
            EOF
            cat > /etc/cfn/hooks.d/cfn-auto-reloader.conf << EOF
            [cfn-auto-reloader-hook]
            triggers=post.update
            path=Resources.LaunchTemplate.Metadata.AWS::CloudFormation::Init
            action=/opt/aws/bin/cfn-init -v --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource LaunchTemplate --region ${AWS::Region}
            runas=root
            EOF
            /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource AutoScalingGroup --region ${AWS::Region}

  AutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      TargetGroupARNs:
        - !Ref TargetGroup
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: 1
      MaxSize: 3
      DesiredCapacity: 2
      HealthCheckType: ELB
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadInstance
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  CodeDeployApplication:
    Type: AWS::CodeDeploy::Application
    Properties:
      ApplicationName: EtherpadCodeDeployApp
      ComputePlatform: Server

  CodeDeployDeploymentGroup:
    Type: AWS::CodeDeploy::DeploymentGroup
    Properties:
      ApplicationName: !Ref CodeDeployApplication
      DeploymentGroupName: EtherpadDeploymentGroup
      ServiceRoleArn: !GetAtt CodeDeployServiceRole.Arn
      AutoScalingGroups:
        - !Ref AutoScalingGroup
      DeploymentConfigName: CodeDeployDefault.OneAtATime
      DeploymentStyle:
        DeploymentType: IN_PLACE
        DeploymentOption: WITH_TRAFFIC_CONTROL
      LoadBalancerInfo:
        TargetGroupPairInfoList:
          - TargetGroups:
              - Name: !Ref TargetGroup
            ProdTrafficRoute:
              ListenerArns:
                - !Ref ALBListener

Outputs:
  ALBDNSName:
    Description: DNS name of the Application Load Balancer
    Value: !GetAtt ALB.DNSName
  RDSInstanceEndpoint:
    Description: RDS instance endpoint address
    Value: !GetAtt RDS.Endpoint.Address
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for deployment artifacts
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys a sample Lambda function with least-privilege IAM role, tracing, logging, and configurable parameters.

Parameters:
  FunctionRuntime:
    Type: String
    Default: python3.12
    Description: Runtime environment for the Lambda function.
  FunctionMemory:
    Type: Number
    Default: 128
    Description: Memory size in MB for the Lambda function.
  FunctionTimeout:
    Type: Number
    Default: 3
    Description: Timeout in seconds for the Lambda function.
  FunctionTracing:
    Type: String
    Default: Active
    AllowedValues:
      - Active
      - PassThrough
    Description: Enable active tracing for the Lambda function.
  LogRetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 14
    Description: Retention period in days for the Lambda log group.
  VpcSecurityGroupIds:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: Comma-separated list of security group IDs for VPC access (optional).
  VpcSubnetIds:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: Comma-separated list of subnet IDs for VPC access (optional).

Conditions:
  HasVpcConfig: !Not 
    - !Equals 
      - !Ref VpcSecurityGroupIds
      - ""
  HasSubnetConfig: !Not 
    - !Equals 
      - !Ref VpcSubnetIds
      - ""

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaSampleLeastPrivilege
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: "*"

  SampleLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub /aws/lambda/${SampleFunction}
      RetentionInDays: !Ref LogRetentionDays

  SampleFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-sample-function
      Runtime: !Ref FunctionRuntime
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import os
          
          def handler(event, context):
              return {
                  "statusCode": 200,
                  "body": json.dumps({
                      "message": "Hello from Lambda sample!",
                      "environment": os.environ.get("SAMPLE_ENV", "default")
                  }) }
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      MemorySize: !Ref FunctionMemory
      Timeout: !Ref FunctionTimeout
      TracingConfig:
        Mode: !Ref FunctionTracing
      Environment:
        Variables:
          SAMPLE_ENV: "production"
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: Sample
        - Key: Managed
          Value: CloudFormation
      VpcConfig:
        SecurityGroupIds: !If [HasVpcConfig, !Split [",", !Ref VpcSecurityGroupIds], !Ref "AWS::NoValue"]
        SubnetIds: !If [HasSubnetConfig, !Split [",", !Ref VpcSubnetIds], !Ref "AWS::NoValue"]
      KmsKeyArn: !GetAtt LambdaKMSKey.Arn

  LambdaKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for Lambda encryption at rest
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: Sample
        - Key: Managed
          Value: CloudFormation

Outputs:
  FunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the sample Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt SampleFunction.Arn
  FunctionName:
    Description: Name of the sample Lambda function
    Value: !Ref SampleFunction

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'IAM Roles for EC2 with read-only access to IAM metadata'

Resources:
  EC2IAMReadOnlyRole1:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties: 
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2-IAM-ReadOnly-Role1'
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument: 
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement: 
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: 
              Service: 
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: 
              - 'sts:AssumeRole'
      ManagedPolicyArns: 
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/IAMReadOnlyAccess'
      Tags: 
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2-IAM-ReadOnly-Role1'
        - Key: 'StackName'
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  EC2IAMReadOnlyRole2:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties: 
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2-IAM-ReadOnly-Role2'
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument: 
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement: 
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: 
              Service: 
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: 
              - 'sts:AssumeRole'
      ManagedPolicyArns: 
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/IAMReadOnlyAccess'
      Tags: 
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2-IAM-ReadOnly-Role2'
        - Key: 'StackName'
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

Outputs:
  Role1Arn:
    Description: 'ARN of the first EC2 IAM read-only role'
    Value: !GetAtt EC2IAMReadOnlyRole1.Arn
  Role1Name:
    Description: 'Name of the first EC2 IAM read-only role'
    Value: !Ref EC2IAMReadOnlyRole1
  Role2Arn:
    Description: 'ARN of the second EC2 IAM read-only role'
    Value: !GetAtt EC2IAMReadOnlyRole2.Arn
  Role2Name:
    Description: 'Name of the second EC2 IAM read-only role'
    Value: !Ref EC2IAMReadOnlyRole2

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'MySQL RDS instance with Provisioned IOPS across two private subnets in a dedicated VPC'

Parameters:
  EnvironmentName:
    Type: String
    Description: 'Name of the environment (e.g., dev, staging, prod)'
    Default: 'prod'
  AllocatedStorage:
    Type: Number
    Description: 'Initial allocated storage size in GB for io1'
    Default: 200
    MinValue: 100
    MaxValue: 65536
  ProvisionedIops:
    Type: Number
    Description: 'Provisioned IOPS (must be >= 3000 for db.r5.large io1)'
    Default: 3000
    MinValue: 3000
    MaxValue: 80000
  KmsKeyArn:
    Type: String
    Description: 'ARN of the KMS key for encryption (optional, use AWS managed if empty)'
    Default: ''
  DatabaseCidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Description: 'CIDR block for the VPC to allow internal traffic access'
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16

Conditions:
  UseCustomerKMSKey: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KmsKeyArn, '']]

Resources:
  # VPC for network isolation
  DatabaseVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref DatabaseCidrBlock
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-database-vpc'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # Internet Gateway (for NAT/Egress if needed, but RDS is private)
  DatabaseInternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-database-igw'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref DatabaseVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref DatabaseInternetGateway

  # Route Table for private subnets (no direct internet route)
  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref DatabaseVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-route-table'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # Two private subnets in different AZs
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref DatabaseVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-subnet-1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref DatabaseVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-private-subnet-2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # Subnet route association (private, no internet)
  Subnet1RouteAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  Subnet2RouteAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  # Security Group for RDS - allow MySQL port 3306 from within VPC CIDR
  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for MySQL RDS instance'
      VpcId: !Ref DatabaseVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: !Ref DatabaseCidrBlock
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-rds-sg'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # DB Subnet Group spanning two private subnets
  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: 'Subnet group for MySQL RDS instance across two AZs'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-db-subnet-group'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # KMS Key for encryption (conditionally created)
  RDSKMSKey:
    Condition: UseCustomerKMSKey
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for RDS encryption in ${EnvironmentName}'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Id: key-default-1
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-rds-kms-key'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # RDS MySQL Instance with Provisioned IOPS (io1)
  MySQLDatabase:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-mysql-instance'
      DBInstanceClass: db.r5.large
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: '8.0.42'
      AllocatedStorage: !Ref AllocatedStorage
      StorageType: io1
      Iops: !Ref ProvisionedIops
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt RDSSecurityGroup.GroupId
      MultiAZ: true
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      StorageEncrypted: true
      KmsKeyId: !If
        - UseCustomerKMSKey
        - !Ref KmsKeyArn
        - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
      DeletionProtection: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      PreferredBackupWindow: '03:00-04:00'
      PreferredMaintenanceWindow: 'sun:04:00-sun:05:00'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-mysql-instance'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

Outputs:
  RDSInstanceEndpoint:
    Description: 'Connection endpoint for the MySQL RDS instance'
    Value: !GetAtt MySQLDatabase.Endpoint.Address
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-rds-endpoint'

  RDSDBSubnetGroupName:
    Description: 'Name of the DB Subnet Group'
    Value: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-db-subnet-group'

  RDSSecurityGroupID:
    Description: 'Security Group ID for RDS access'
    Value: !Ref RDSSecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-rds-sg-id'

  RDSInstanceIdentifier:
    Description: 'RDS Instance Identifier'
    Value: !Ref MySQLDatabase
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-rds-instance-id'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys a MySQL RDS instance with VPC, public subnets, Internet Gateway, route table, automated snapshots, and security group.'

Transform:
  AWS::Include:
    Location: ./azs.yaml

Parameters:
  SubnetIndex:
    Type: Number
    Description: Index of the Availability Zone to use for public subnets (0 or 1)
    Default: 0

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Select [0, !Transform [AZs]]
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [!Ref SubnetIndex, !Transform [AZs]]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Select [1, !Transform [AZs]]
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [!Ref SubnetIndex, !Transform [AZs]]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow MySQL access within VPC
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RDSSecurityGroup'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  MySQLRDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.micro
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: '8.0.41'
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      StorageType: gp2
      MultiAZ: false
      PubliclyAccessible: true
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt RDSSecurityGroup.GroupId
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      DeletionProtection: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MySQLInstance'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnet group for RDS MySQL instance
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DBSubnetGroup'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 1 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 2 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
  RDSEndpoint:
    Description: RDS instance endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt MySQLRDSInstance.Endpoint.Address
  RDSPort:
    Description: RDS instance port
    Value: !GetAtt MySQLRDSInstance.Endpoint.Port
