final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys a MySQL RDS instance in a VPC with private subnets, custom parameter group, security group, and Secrets Manager integration.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet1'

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet2'

  DBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Restrict inbound access, allow necessary outbound
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress: []
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DBSecurityGroup'

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnet group for RDS MySQL in private subnets
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DBSubnetGroup'

  DBParameterGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBParameterGroup
    Properties:
      Family: mysql8.0
      Description: Custom parameter group for MySQL RDS instance
      Parameters:
        max_connections: '150'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DBParameterGroup'

  SecretsManagerSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}/RDS/AdminCredentials'
      GenerateSecretString:
        PasswordLength: 30
        ExcludeCharacters: '"@/\'
        IncludeSpace: false
        RequireEachIncludedType: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecretsManagerSecret'

  RDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.micro
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: '8.0.41'
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt DBSecurityGroup.GroupId
      DBParameterGroupName: !Ref DBParameterGroup
      MasterUsername: !Sub '{{resolve:secretsmanager:${SecretsManagerSecret}:SecretString:username}}'
      MasterUserPassword: !Sub '{{resolve:secretsmanager:${SecretsManagerSecret}:SecretString:password}}'
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      MultiAZ: false
      DeletionProtection: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      PreferredBackupWindow: '07:00-09:00'
      StorageEncrypted: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RDSInstance'

Outputs:
  SecretArn:
    Description: ARN of the Secrets Manager secret containing RDS credentials
    Value: !Ref SecretsManagerSecret
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecretArn'

  RDSEndpoint:
    Description: Connection endpoint for the RDS instance
    Value: !GetAtt RDSInstance.Endpoint.Address
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RDSEndpoint'

  DatabaseName:
    Description: Name of the database (default instance name)
    Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Creates secure S3 buckets for replicas and access logs with encryption, public access blocking, and secure transport enforcement.

Resources:
  ReplicaBucketKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for replica bucket encryption - ${AWS::StackName}'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ReplicaBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 'replica-bucket-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !GetAtt ReplicaBucketKey.Arn
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      LoggingConfiguration:
        DestinationBucketName: !Ref AccessLogBucket
        LogFilePrefix: replica-access-logs/
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  AccessLogBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 'access-log-bucket-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ReplicaBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ReplicaBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt ReplicaBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${ReplicaBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': 'false'

  AccessLogBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref AccessLogBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt AccessLogBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${AccessLogBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': 'false'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'S3 Bucket with Lambda trigger, IAM role, KMS encryption, and CloudWatch logging'

Parameters:
  LambdaFunctionName:
    Type: String
    Default: S3TriggerFunction
    Description: Name for the Lambda function
  LambdaMemorySize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 128
    Description: Memory size in MB for the Lambda function
  LambdaTimeout:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    Description: Timeout in seconds for the Lambda function
  LambdaRuntime:
    Type: String
    Default: python3.12
    Description: Runtime for the Lambda function
  Stage:
    Type: String
    Default: dev
    Description: Deployment stage (e.g., dev, prod)

Resources:
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-s3-trigger-bucket'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref LambdaKMSKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: S3TriggerBucket
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3ObjectReadAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                Resource:
                  - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: LambdaExecution
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  LambdaKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for Lambda function encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: LambdaEncryption
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  LambdaKMSAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${AWS::StackName}-lambda-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref LambdaKMSKey

  S3EventLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref LambdaFunctionName
      Runtime: !Ref LambdaRuntime
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import os
          def handler(event, context):
              print("Event: " + json.dumps(event))
              bucket = event['Records'][0]['s3']['bucket']['name']
              key = event['Records'][0]['s3']['object']['key']
              print(f"Processing file {key} from bucket {bucket}")
              return {'statusCode': 200, 'body': json.dumps('Success')}
      MemorySize: !Ref LambdaMemorySize
      Timeout: !Ref LambdaTimeout
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Environment:
        Variables:
          BUCKET_NAME: !Ref S3Bucket
          STAGE: !Ref Stage
      KmsKeyArn: !GetAtt LambdaKMSKey.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: S3TriggerLambda
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionName:
    Description: Name of the Lambda function
    Value: !Ref S3EventLambdaFunction
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt S3EventLambdaFunction.Arn
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Creates an encrypted Amazon SQS FIFO Queue with ContentBasedDeduplication enabled, tags applied, and encrypted via queue policy.

Parameters:
  KmsMasterKeyId:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of the custom KMS key for queue encryption (must be a customer-managed CMK, not an AWS-managed key)

Resources:
  FifoQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      FifoQueue: true
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-queue.fifo'
      ContentBasedDeduplication: true
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20
      Encryption:
        KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref KmsMasterKeyId
        KmsDataKeyReusePeriodSeconds: 300
        ManagedEncryption: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  FifoQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref FifoQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceKmsEncryption
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt FifoQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                kms:ViaService: !Sub 'sqs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
                kms:EncryptionContext: !Sub 'sqs.${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${AWS::StackName}-queue.fifo'

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS FIFO Queue
    Value: !GetAtt FifoQueue.QueueUrl
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-QueueUrl'
  QueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the SQS FIFO Queue
    Value: !GetAtt FifoQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-QueueArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Creates an SQS Standard Queue with encryption, policy, and outputs.

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Description: Environment tag value (e.g., dev, staging, prod)
    Default: dev
  Application:
    Type: String
    Description: Application name tag
    Default: my-application
  Owner:
    Type: String
    Description: Owner tag for cost allocation
    Default: platform-team

Resources:
  CustomerManagedKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: Customer-managed CMK for SQS queue encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Id: key-policy
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowRootAccountFullAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowSQSEncryptionDecryption
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:Encrypt
            Resource: '*'

  CustomerManagedKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/sqs-queue-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref CustomerManagedKey

  StandardQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${Environment}-${Application}-standard-queue'
      KmsDataKeyReusePeriodSeconds: 300
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref CustomerManagedKey
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  StandardQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref StandardQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowProducersToSendMessages
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt StandardQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:function:ProducerFunction'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:network-interface/*'
          - Sid: AllowConsumersToReceiveAndDeleteMessages
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt StandardQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:function:ConsumerFunction'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:instance/*'

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS Standard Queue
    Value: !Ref StandardQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-QueueUrl'
  QueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the SQS Standard Queue
    Value: !GetAtt StandardQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-QueueArn'
  CustomerManagedKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the customer-managed KMS key used for queue encryption
    Value: !GetAtt CustomerManagedKey.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: VPC with public and private subnets across two Availability Zones using static AZ mapping.

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AZ1: us-east-1a
      AZ2: us-east-1b
    us-west-2:
      AZ1: us-west-2a
      AZ2: us-west-2b
    eu-west-1:
      AZ1: eu-west-1a
      AZ2: eu-west-1b

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ1]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ2]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ1]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicNetworkAcl:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicNetworkAcl'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicNetworkAclIngressHTTP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 80
        To: 80

  PublicNetworkAclIngressHTTPS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 443
        To: 443

  PublicNetworkAclEgress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: true
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0

  PublicSubnet1NetworkAclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl

  PublicSubnet2NetworkAclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 1 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 2 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
  PrivateSubnetId:
    Description: Private Subnet ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet
  AZ1:
    Description: Availability Zone 1
    Value: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ1]
  AZ2:
    Description: Availability Zone 2
    Value: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ2]

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'S3 bucket with KMS encryption, lifecycle management, versioning, public access block, and organizational tagging'

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Description: Prefix for the S3 bucket name (will be combined with account ID and region)
    Default: s3-data-bucket
  RetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Description: Number of days after which objects are expired
    Default: 365
  TransitionDaysToIA:
    Type: Number
    Description: Number of days after which objects transition to Infrequent Access
    Default: 30
  TransitionDaysToGlacier:
    Type: Number
    Description: Number of days after which objects transition to Glacier
    Default: 90

Resources:
  KMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Id: key-default-1
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnableIAMUserPermissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowS3EncryptionAndDecryption
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowKeyAdministratorsAndUsersToManageTheKey
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action:
              - kms:Create*
              - kms:Describe*
              - kms:Enable*
              - kms:List*
              - kms:Put*
              - kms:Update*
              - kms:Revoke*
              - kms:Disable*
              - kms:Get*
              - kms:Delete*
              - kms:ScheduleKeyDeletion
              - kms:CancelKeyDeletion
            Resource: '*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KMSKey'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Owner
          Value: TeamA
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: '12345'

  KMSAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${AWS::StackName}-s3-encryption-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref KMSKey

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              KMSMasterKeyID: !GetAtt KMSKey.Arn
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: TransitionAndExpirationRule
            Status: Enabled
            Prefix: ''
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionDaysToIA
                StorageClass: INTELLIGENT_TIERING
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionDaysToGlacier
                StorageClass: GLACIER
            ExpirationInDays: !Ref RetentionDays
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3Bucket'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Owner
          Value: TeamA
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: '12345'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: VPC with Managed NAT Gateway, public and private subnets across multiple AZs, route tables, NACLs, security groups, and VPC Flow Logs.

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC.
  PublicSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for Public Subnet 1.
  PublicSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for Public Subnet 2.
  PrivateSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for Private Subnet 1.
  PrivateSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.3.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for Private Subnet 2.

Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  # Internet Gateway
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-IGW"
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  VpcGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Subnets (2 AZs, 2 subnets per AZ: public and private)
  AZs:
    Fn::Transform:
      Name: AWS::Include
      Parameters:
        location: !Sub "t2.micro"  # Placeholder to enable dynamic AZ count via mapping; actual list derived via GetAZs in resources.

  # Public Subnets
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1-${!Select [0, !GetAZs '']}"
        - Key: Type
          Value: Public
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2-${!Select [1, !GetAZs '']}"
        - Key: Type
          Value: Public
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  # Private Subnets
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet1Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet1-${!Select [0, !GetAZs '']}"
        - Key: Type
          Value: Private
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet2Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet2-${!Select [1, !GetAZs '']}"
        - Key: Type
          Value: Private
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  # Elastic IP for NAT Gateway
  NATGatewayEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-NAT-EIP"
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  # NAT Gateway in a public subnet
  NATGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NATGatewayEIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-NATGateway"
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  # Public Route Table
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable"
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Private Route Table
  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable"
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  # Network ACLs
  PublicNetworkAcl:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicNACL"
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicNetworkAclEntryInboundEphemeral:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  PublicNetworkAclEntryOutboundEphemeral:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: true
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  PublicSubnet1NetworkAclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl

  PublicSubnet2NetworkAclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl

  PrivateNetworkAcl:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateNACL"
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateNetworkAclEntryInboundEphemeral:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  PrivateNetworkAclEntryOutboundEphemeral:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: true
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  PrivateSubnet1NetworkAclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateNetworkAcl

  PrivateSubnet2NetworkAclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateNetworkAcl

  # Security Groups
  NATSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow outbound traffic from private subnets via NAT
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-NAT-SG"
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  NATSecurityGroupEgress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupEgress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref NATSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: 6
      FromPort: 1024
      ToPort: 65535
      DestinationSecurityGroupId: !Ref NATSecurityGroup
      Description: Allow ephemeral outbound traffic to NAT Security Group

  PrivateSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow outbound traffic to NAT Gateway
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-Private-SG"
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateSecurityGroupEgress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupEgress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref PrivateSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: 6
      FromPort: 1024
      ToPort: 65535
      DestinationSecurityGroupId: !Ref NATSecurityGroup
      Description: Allow ephemeral outbound traffic to NAT Security Group

  # VPC Flow Logs
  FlowLogRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: vpc-flow-logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FlowLogPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:DescribeLogGroups
                  - logs:DescribeLogStreams
                Resource: "*"

  FlowLog:
    Type: AWS::EC2::FlowLog
    Properties:
      ResourceType: VPC
      ResourceId: !Ref VPC
      TrafficType: ALL
      LogGroupName: !Sub "/aws/vpc/${AWS::StackName}/flow-logs"
      DeliverLogsPermissionArn: !GetAtt FlowLogRole.Arn
      LogDestinationType: cloud-watch-logs
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-FlowLog"
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 1 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 2 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
  PrivateSubnet1Id:
    Description: Private Subnet 1 ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
  PrivateSubnet2Id:
    Description: Private Subnet 2 ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
  NATGatewayId:
    Description: NAT Gateway ID
    Value: !Ref NATGateway
  NATGatewayEIP:
    Description: NAT Gateway Elastic IP
    Value: !Ref NATGatewayEIP
  PublicRouteTableId:
    Description: Public Route Table ID
    Value: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  PrivateRouteTableId:
    Description: Private Route Table ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
  FlowLogGroupName:
    Description: VPC Flow Log Group Name
    Value: !Sub "/aws/vpc/${AWS::StackName}/flow-logs"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  CloudFormation template to create an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream
  with server-side encryption using AWS-managed KMS key and error logging to CloudWatch Logs.

Metadata:
  AWS::CloudFormation::Interface:
    ParameterGroups:
      - Label:
          default: "Environment Configuration"
        Parameters:
          - Environment
          - LogRetentionDays

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Description: Environment tag for resource naming and tagging (e.g., dev, staging, prod).
    Default: dev
  LogRetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Description: Retention period in days for the CloudWatch Log Group.
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 365

Resources:
  FirehoseErrorLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub "/aws/kinesisfirehose/${Environment}/error"
      RetentionInDays: !Ref LogRetentionDays
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: FirehoseErrorLogging

  FirehoseErrorLogStream:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogStream
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Ref FirehoseErrorLogGroup
      LogStreamName: !Sub "${Environment}-error-stream"

  FirehoseDeliveryRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: firehose.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FirehoseCloudWatchAndKMSAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:DescribeLogStreams
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt FirehoseErrorLogGroup.Arn
                  - !Sub "${FirehoseErrorLogGroup.Arn}:*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey*
                  - kms:Decrypt
                Resource: "*"
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    kms:ViaService: !Sub "s3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
                  ArnLike:
                    kms:EncryptionContext:aws:kms:*
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:AbortMultipartUpload
                  - s3:GetBucketLocation
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                  - s3:ListBucketMultipartUploads
                  - s3:PutObject
                Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: FirehoseRole

  FirehoseDeliveryStream:
    Type: AWS::KinesisFirehose::DeliveryStream
    Properties:
      DeliveryStreamName: !Sub "${Environment}-firehose-delivery-stream"
      DeliveryStreamType: DirectPut
      S3DestinationConfiguration:
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseDeliveryRole.Arn
        BucketARN: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::example-firehose-bucket-${Environment}"
        Prefix: !Sub "year=!{timestamp:yyyy}/month=!{timestamp:MM}/day=!{timestamp:dd}/"
        ErrorOutputPrefix: !Sub "errors/${Environment}/"
        CloudWatchLoggingOptions:
          Enabled: true
          LogGroupName: !Ref FirehoseErrorLogGroup
          LogStreamName: !Ref FirehoseErrorLogStream
      BufferingHints:
        SizeInMBs: 5
        IntervalInSeconds: 300
      RetryOptions:
        DurationInSeconds: 300
      CompressionFormat: UNCOMPRESSED
      DataFormatConversionConfiguration:
        Enabled: false
        InputFormatConfiguration:
          Deserializer:
            OpenXJsonSerDe: {}
        OutputFormatConfiguration:
          Serializer:
            ParquetSerDe: {}
        SchemaConfiguration:
          DatabaseName: !Sub "${Environment}-database"
          RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseDeliveryRole.Arn
          TableName: !Sub "${Environment}-table"
      EncryptionConfiguration:
        NoEncryptionConfig: NoEncryption
        KMSEncryptionConfig:
          AWSKMSKeyId: alias/aws/kinesis
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: FirehoseDelivery

  FirehoseDeliveryRoleTags:
    Type: AWS::Tags
    Properties:
      ResourceARN: !GetAtt FirehoseDeliveryRole.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: FirehoseRole

  FirehoseDeliveryStreamTags:
    Type: AWS::Tags
    Properties:
      ResourceARN: !Ref FirehoseDeliveryStream
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: FirehoseDelivery

Outputs:
  FirehoseStreamName:
    Description: Name of the Firehose delivery stream
    Value: !Ref FirehoseDeliveryStream
  FirehoseStreamARN:
    Description: ARN of the Firehose delivery stream
    Value: !GetAtt FirehoseDeliveryStream.Arn
  CloudWatchLogGroupName:
    Description: CloudWatch Log Group for error logs
    Value: !Ref FirehoseErrorLogGroup
  CloudWatchLogStreamName:
    Description: CloudWatch Log Stream for error logs
    Value: !Ref FirehoseErrorLogStream

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Resilient Jenkins CI/CD Server with automated recovery

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 0, !GetAZs "" ]

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  JenkinsSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Jenkins server
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: Allow HTTP access to Jenkins
        - IpProtocol: icmp
          FromPort: -1
          ToPort: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: Allow ICMP (ping) access
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  JenkinsElasticIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc

  JenkinsIAMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore

  JenkinsInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref JenkinsIAMRole

  JenkinsUserData:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Activation
    Properties:
      IamRole: !GetAtt JenkinsIAMRole.Arn
      RegistrationLimit: "1"
      RegistrationExpirationDate: !Sub "2025-12-31T23:59:59Z"
      Name: JenkinsActivation

  JenkinsEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref "AWS::Region", AMI]
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref JenkinsInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref JenkinsSecurityGroup
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 8
            VolumeType: gp2
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -e
          INSTANCE_ID=$(curl -s http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/instance-id)
          echo Configuring instance $INSTANCE_ID

          # Update and install dependencies
          yum update -y
          yum install -y epel-release
          yum install -y java-1.8.0-openjdk wget

          # Install Jenkins
          wget -O /etc/yum.repos.d/jenkins.repo https://pkg.jenkins.io/redhat-stable/jenkins.repo
          rpm --import https://pkg.jenkins.io/redhat-stable/jenkins.io.key
          yum install -y jenkins

          # Configure Jenkins to listen on all interfaces
          sed -i 's/JENKINS_LISTEN_ADDRESS=""/JENKINS_LISTEN_ADDRESS="0.0.0.0"/' /etc/sysconfig/jenkins

          # Start and enable Jenkins
          systemctl daemon-reload
          systemctl enable jenkins
          systemctl start jenkins

          # Wait for Jenkins to be ready
          for i in $(seq 1 30); do
            if curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8080; then
              echo Jenkins is up
              break
            fi
            echo Waiting for Jenkins to start... ($i/30)
            sleep 10
          done

  CloudWatchAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-InstanceStatusCheckFailed"
      AlarmDescription: Triggers recovery when instance status check fails
      MetricName: StatusCheckFailed
      Namespace: AWS/EC2
      Statistic: Maximum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 1
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      Dimensions:
        - Name: InstanceId
          Value: !Ref JenkinsEC2Instance
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref RecoveryPolicy
      OKActions:
        - !Ref RecoveryPolicy

  RecoveryPolicy:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Properties:
      AdjustmentType: ChangeInCapacity
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Ref JenkinsAutoScalingGroup
      PolicyType: SimpleScaling
      ScalingAdjustment: 1
      Cooldown: 300

  JenkinsLaunchConfiguration:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::LaunchConfiguration
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref "AWS::Region", AMI]
      IamInstanceProfile: !GetAtt JenkinsInstanceProfile.Arn
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref JenkinsSecurityGroup

  JenkinsAutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet
      LaunchConfigurationName: !Ref JenkinsLaunchConfiguration
      MinSize: 1
      MaxSize: 1
      DesiredCapacity: 1
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c55b159cbfafe1f0
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0b2f6494ff0b00a54
    us-west-1:
      AMI: ami-05eac785520250444
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-03cf127a
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-047bb4163c506cd98
    eu-west-2:
      AMI: ami-074e80ee923ee516e
    eu-west-3:
      AMI: ami-0e3408f195e3c867f
    eu-central-1:
      AMI: ami-0630895f467bee7c1
    ap-southeast-1:
      AMI: ami-084669726a88f9068
    ap-southeast-2:
      AMI: ami-0f120b62219ac485b
    ap-northeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0dcc1e2163588ed45
    ap-northeast-2:
      AMI: ami-0044f47048924816b
    sa-east-1:
      AMI: ami-07382d40ca5419376

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates an IAM role for EC2 instances with read-only access to IAM metadata and EC2 resources.'

Resources:
  EC2InstanceIAMReadOnlyRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2InstanceIAMReadOnlyRole'
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: IAMReadOnlyAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - iam:Get*
                  - iam:List*
                Resource: '*'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonEC2ReadOnlyAccess

Outputs:
  RoleName:
    Description: 'The name of the IAM role created for EC2 instances.'
    Value: !Ref EC2InstanceIAMReadOnlyRole
  RoleArn:
    Description: 'The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role.'
    Value: !GetAtt EC2InstanceIAMReadOnlyRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'AWS Glue ETL job infrastructure with S3, IAM role, and Glue job configured for version 4.0'

Resources:
  GlueScriptsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 'glue-scripts-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: alias/aws/s3
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-glue-scripts-bucket'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  GlueScriptsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref GlueScriptsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt GlueScriptsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${GlueScriptsBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'
          - Sid: LeastPrivilegeAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub '${GlueScriptsBucket.Arn}/*'
          - Sid: ListBucketWithPrefix
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:ListBucket
            Resource: !GetAtt GlueScriptsBucket.Arn
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                s3:prefix:
                  - 'gue_scripts/*'
                  - 'logs/*'

  GlueServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: glue.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSGlueServiceRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: GlueS3Access
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                Resource: !Sub '${GlueScriptsBucket.Arn}/gue_scripts/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: !GetAtt GlueScriptsBucket.Arn
                Condition:
                  StringLike:
                    s3:prefix:
                      - 'gue_scripts/*'
                      - 'logs/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-glue-role'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  GlueJob:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Job
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-etl-job'
      Role: !GetAtt GlueServiceRole.Arn
      Command:
        Name: glueetl
        ScriptLocation: !Sub 's3://${GlueScriptsBucket}/gue_scripts/sample_convert.py'
        PythonVersion: '3'
      GlueVersion: '4.0'
      NumberOfWorkers: 2
      WorkerType: G.1X
      Tags:
        Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-glue-job'
        Environment: !Ref AWS::StackName

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Amazon ECS cluster configured for serverless usage with AWS Fargate, including VPC, subnets, security groups, IAM roles, and logging.'

Parameters:
  EnvironmentName:
    Type: String
    Default: dev
    Description: Environment name (e.g., dev, staging, prod)
  Owner:
    Type: String
    Default: cloudformation
    Description: Owner or team name for resource tagging
  ApplicationName:
    Type: String
    Default: ecs-fargate-app
    Description: Application name for resource tagging
  VPCCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC
  PublicSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for public subnet in AZ1
  PublicSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for public subnet in AZ2
  PrivateSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.101.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for private subnet in AZ1
  PrivateSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.102.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for private subnet in AZ2

Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VPCCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-vpc-${EnvironmentName}"
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  # Internet Gateway
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-igw-${EnvironmentName}"
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public Subnets
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-public-subnet1-${EnvironmentName}"
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-public-subnet2-${EnvironmentName}"
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  # Private Subnets
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet1Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-private-subnet1-${EnvironmentName}"
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet2Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-private-subnet2-${EnvironmentName}"
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  # Public Route Table
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-public-rt-${EnvironmentName}"
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Private Route Table
  PrivateRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-private-rt1-${EnvironmentName}"
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1

  PrivateRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-private-rt2-${EnvironmentName}"
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2

  # Security Groups
  ECSTaskSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for ECS tasks
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-task-sg-${EnvironmentName}"
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  ECSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for ECS cluster to allow Fargate communication
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref ECSTaskSecurityGroup
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref ECSTaskSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-cluster-sg-${EnvironmentName}"
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  # IAM Roles
  TaskExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonECSTaskExecutionRolePolicy
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-task-execution-role-${EnvironmentName}"
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  TaskRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-task-role-${EnvironmentName}"
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  # CloudWatch Log Group
  LogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub "/ecs/${ApplicationName}-${EnvironmentName}"
      RetentionInDays: 7
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-log-group-${EnvironmentName}"
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  # ECS Cluster
  ECSCluster:
    Type: AWS::ECS::Cluster
    Properties:
