final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  Amazon Kinesis Data Stream with CloudWatch alarms for read/write throughput
  exceeding. Includes SNS notifications and IAM permissions.

Parameters:
  StreamName:
    Type: String
    Default: RealTimeDataStream
    Description: Name of the Kinesis Data Stream
  ShardCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    Description: Number of shards for the Kinesis Data Stream
  ReadThresholdPercent:
    Type: Number
    Default: 80
    Description: Threshold percentage for read provisioned throughput exceeded alarms
  WriteThresholdPercent:
    Type: Number
    Default: 80
    Description: Threshold percentage for write provisioned throughput exceeded alarms
  AlarmEmail:
    Type: String
    Description: Email address to receive SNS notifications (update after stack creation if needed)

Resources:
  KMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for encrypting Kinesis Data Stream and SNS topic at rest
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Id: key-default-1
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow Kinesis Service to use the key for encryption
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: kinesis.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:Encrypt
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow CloudWatch to use the key for encryption
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudwatch.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:Encrypt
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: RealTimeDataProcessing
        - Key: Component
          Value: KMSKey

  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: !Sub ${StreamName}-Throughput-Alerts
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref KMSKey
      Subscription:
        - Protocol: email
          Endpoint: !Ref AlarmEmail
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: RealTimeDataProcessing
        - Key: Component
          Value: SNSNotifications

  KinesisDataStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref StreamName
      ShardCount: !Ref ShardCount
      RetentionPeriodHours: 24
      EncryptionType: KMS
      KmsDataKeyReusePeriodSeconds: 300
      KeyId: !GetAtt KMSKey.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: RealTimeDataProcessing
        - Key: Component
          Value: KinesisStream
    DependsOn: KMSKey

  IAMRoleForCloudWatch:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudwatch.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CloudWatchPublishToSNS
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref SNSTopic
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudwatch:DescribeAlarms
                  - cloudwatch:ListMetrics
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: KinesisMetricsReadAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudwatch:GetMetricStatistics
                  - cloudwatch:ListMetrics
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: KinesisStreamAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kinesis:DescribeStream
                  - kinesis:ListStreams
                Resource: !GetAtt KinesisDataStream.Arn

  ReadProvisionedThroughputExceededAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub ${StreamName}-ReadProvisionedThroughputExceeded
      AlarmDescription: >
        Triggered when read provisioned throughput exceeds the configured threshold
        for the Kinesis Data Stream
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref SNSTopic
      OKActions:
        - !Ref SNSTopic
      MetricName: ReadProvisionedThroughputExceeded
      Namespace: AWS/Kinesis
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: !Sub (${ShardCount} * ${ReadThresholdPercent} / 100)
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      Dimensions:
        - Name: StreamName
          Value: !Ref StreamName
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: RealTimeDataProcessing
        - Key: Component
          Value: CloudWatchAlarm
    DependsOn: KinesisDataStream

  WriteProvisionedThroughputExceededAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub ${StreamName}-WriteProvisionedThroughputExceeded
      AlarmDescription: >
        Triggered when write provisioned throughput exceeds the configured threshold
        for the Kinesis Data Stream
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref SNSTopic
      OKActions:
        - !Ref SNSTopic
      MetricName: WriteProvisionedThroughputExceeded
      Namespace: AWS/Kinesis
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: !Sub (${ShardCount} * ${WriteThresholdPercent} / 100)
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      Dimensions:
        - Name: StreamName
          Value: !Ref StreamName
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: RealTimeDataProcessing
        - Key: Component
          Value: CloudWatchAlarm
    DependsOn: KinesisDataStream

Outputs:
  StreamARN:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Stream
    Value: !GetAtt KinesisDataStream.Arn
  StreamName:
    Description: Name of the Kinesis Data Stream
    Value: !Ref StreamName
  ReadProvisionedThroughputExceededAlarmName:
    Description: Name of the read throughput exceeded CloudWatch alarm
    Value: !Ref ReadProvisionedThroughputExceededAlarm
  WriteProvisionedThroughputExceededAlarmName:
    Description: Name of the write throughput exceeded CloudWatch alarm
    Value: !Ref WriteProvisionedThroughputExceededAlarm
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic for alert notifications
    Value: !Ref SNSTopic

Resources:

    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties: 
      Description: 'KMS Key for centralized encryption management'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      Tags: 
        - Key: 'Purpose'
          Value: 'CentralizedEncryption'
        - Key: 'ManagedBy'
          Value: 'CloudFormation'

  CentralizedEncryptionKeyAlias:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Alias'
    Properties: 
      AliasName: 'alias/centralized-encryption-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref CentralizedEncryptionKey

Outputs:

    Description: 'The ARN of the KMS Key'
    Value: !GetAtt CentralizedEncryptionKey.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KMSKeyArn'
  KMSKeyAliasName:
    Description: 'The Alias name of the KMS Key'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Amazon Aurora MySQL cluster with two db.t3.large instances and custom parameter groups enforcing time_zone and sql_mode settings.'

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      VpcCidr: 10.0.0.0/16
    us-east-2:
      VpcCidr: 10.1.0.0/16
    us-west-1:
      VpcCidr: 10.2.0.0/16
    us-west-2:
      VpcCidr: 10.3.0.0/16
    ap-south-1:
      VpcCidr: 10.4.0.0/16
    ap-northeast-1:
      VpcCidr: 10.5.0.0/16
    ap-northeast-2:
      VpcCidr: 10.6.0.0/16
    ap-southeast-1:
      VpcCidr: 10.7.0.0/16
    ap-southeast-2:
      VpcCidr: 10.8.0.0/16
    eu-west-1:
      VpcCidr: 10.9.0.0/16
    eu-west-2:
      VpcCidr: 10.10.0.0/16
    eu-west-3:
      VpcCidr: 10.11.0.0/16
    eu-north-1:
      VpcCidr: 10.12.0.0/16
    sa-east-1:
      VpcCidr: 10.13.0.0/16
    cn-north-1:
      VpcCidr: 10.14.0.0/16
    cn-northwest-1:
      VpcCidr: 10.15.0.0/16

Resources:
  AuroraSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Aurora MySQL access
      VpcId: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnet group for Aurora cluster across multiple AZs
      SubnetIds:
        - !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
        - !Select [1, !GetAZs '']

  CustomDBParameterGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBClusterParameterGroup
    Properties:
      Family: aurora-mysql5.7
      Description: Custom parameter group for Aurora MySQL with time_zone and sql_mode settings
      Parameters:
        time_zone: SYSTEM
        sql_mode: STRICT_TRANS_TABLES,NO_ZERO_IN_DATE,NO_ZERO_DATE,ERROR_FOR_DIVISION_BY_ZERO,NO_AUTO_CREATE_USER,NO_ENGINE_SUBSTITUTION

  AuroraKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for Aurora cluster encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Id: key-policy
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'

  AuroraDBCluster:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBCluster
    Properties:
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      EngineMode: provisioned
      DatabaseName: appdb
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref DBClusterName
      DBClusterParameterGroupName: !Ref CustomDBParameterGroup
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      PreferredBackupWindow: '03:00-04:00'
      PreferredMaintenanceWindow: 'sun:04:00-sun:05:00'
      EnableHttpEndpoint: false
      EnableIAMDatabaseAuthentication: false
      StorageEncrypted: true
      KmsKeyId: !GetAtt AuroraKMSKey.Arn
      DeletionProtection: false
      CopyTagsToSnapshot: true
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup

  DBInstance1:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraDBCluster
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Ref DBInstanceIdentifier1
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      DBParameterGroupName: !Ref CustomDBParameterGroup
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      MonitoringInterval: 0

  DBInstance2:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraDBCluster
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Ref DBInstanceIdentifier2
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      DBParameterGroupName: !Ref CustomDBParameterGroup
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      MonitoringInterval: 0

Outputs:
  ClusterEndpoint:
    Description: Cluster endpoint address
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraDBCluster.Endpoint.Address
  ClusterReaderEndpoint:
    Description: Cluster reader endpoint for load balancing
    Value: !Join ['', [!GetAtt AuroraDBCluster.ReadEndpoint.Address]]
  DBInstance1Endpoint:
    Description: First DB instance endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt DBInstance1.Endpoint.Address
  DBInstance2Endpoint:
    Description: Second DB instance endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt DBInstance2.Endpoint.Address
  SecurityGroup:
    Description: Security group ID attached to the cluster
    Value: !Ref AuroraSecurityGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Amazon Aurora MySQL cluster with CloudWatch Logs integration, multi-AZ, two publicly accessible db.t3.large instances across two subnets.'

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC
  PublicSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for public subnet 1
  PublicSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for public subnet 2
  DatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name for the Aurora database
    Default: appdb
  DatabaseUser:
    Type: String
    Description: Master username for the database
    NoEcho: true
  EngineVersion:
    Type: String
    Default: '5.7.mysql_aurora.2.10.2'
    Description: Aurora MySQL engine version
  ClusterName:
    Type: String
    Default: AuroraMySQLCluster
    Description: Name for the Aurora cluster

Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  # Internet Gateway
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public Subnets
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  # Route Table for Public Subnets
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Security Group for Aurora
  AuroraSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Aurora MySQL cluster
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AuroraSG'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  # DB Subnet Group
  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnet group for Aurora MySQL cluster
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DBSubnetGroup'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  # Aurora MySQL Cluster
  AuroraCluster:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBCluster
    Properties:
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      EngineVersion: !Ref EngineVersion
      DatabaseName: !Ref DatabaseName
      MasterUsername: !Ref DatabaseUser
      ManageMasterUserPassword: true
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !GetAtt AuroraSecurityGroup.GroupId
      MultiAZ: true
      EnableCloudwatchLogsExports:
        - error
        - audit
        - general
        - slowquery
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      DeletionProtection: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref ClusterName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  # Aurora Instance 1
  AuroraInstance1:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraCluster
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      PubliclyAccessible: true
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup

  # Aurora Instance 2
  AuroraInstance2:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraCluster
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      PubliclyAccessible: true
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup

Outputs:
  ClusterEndpoint:
    Description: Cluster endpoint address
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraCluster.Endpoint.Address
  ClusterReaderEndpoint:
    Description: Cluster reader endpoint address
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraCluster.ReadEndpoint.Address
  DBInstance1Identifier:
    Description: DB instance 1 identifier
    Value: !Ref AuroraInstance1
  DBInstance2Identifier:
    Description: DB instance 2 identifier
    Value: !Ref AuroraInstance2

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Creates a Lambda function with Node.js 20.x runtime that prints hello world.

Resources:
  HelloWorldLambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: HelloWorld

  HelloWorldLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub 'hello-world-${AWS::StackName}'
      Runtime: nodejs20.x
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt HelloWorldLambdaRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            console.log('hello world');
            return {
              statusCode: 200,
              body: JSON.stringify('hello world'),
            };
          };
      MemorySize: 128
      Timeout: 3
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: HelloWorld

Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionName:
    Description: The name of the Lambda function.
    Value: !Ref HelloWorldLambdaFunction
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: The ARN of the Lambda function.
    Value: !GetAtt HelloWorldLambdaFunction.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'VPC with a single public subnet, Internet Gateway, and associated routing infrastructure for internet accessibility and demonstration use cases.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties: 
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags: 
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicNetworkAcl:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicNetworkAcl'

  PublicNetworkAclIngressRuleHTTP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 80
        To: 80

  PublicNetworkAclIngressRuleHTTPS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 443
        To: 443

  PublicNetworkAclEgressRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: true
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 80
        To: 80

  PublicSubnetNetworkAclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl

  VPCSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Enable restricted SSH and ICMP access for demonstration and troubleshooting
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: icmp
          FromPort: -1
          ToPort: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityGroup'

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VpcId'

  SubnetId:
    Description: Public Subnet ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SubnetId'

  InternetGatewayId:
    Description: Internet Gateway ID
    Value: !Ref InternetGateway
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InternetGatewayId'

  PublicSubnetCidr:
    Description: Public Subnet CIDR Block
    Value: !GetAtt PublicSubnet.CidrBlock

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  S3 bucket with optional organization-wide access, encryption, versioning,
  and logging. Supports enterprise-wide (via OrganizationId parameter) or
  single-account use when the parameter is omitted/empty.

Parameters:
  OrganizationId:
    Type: String
    Description: >-
      AWS Organization ID (e.g., o-xxxxxxxxxxxx). When provided, access is
      restricted to principals belonging to this organization. Leave empty for
      single-account use.
    Default: ''
    NoEcho: true

  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Description: Prefix for the S3 bucket name.
    Default: s3data

  EnableDataEventsLogging:
    Type: String
    Description: Enable S3 DataEvents logging for security monitoring.
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Default: 'false'

  LoggingPrefix:
    Type: String
    Description: Prefix for log object keys in the logging bucket.
    Default: s3-logs/

  SourceArn:
    Type: String
    Description: Source bucket ARN for logging configuration.
    Default: ''

Conditions:
  IsEnterpriseAccess: !Not [!Equals [!Ref OrganizationId, '']]
  EnableDataEventsLoggingCondition: !Equals [!Ref EnableDataEventsLogging, 'true']

Resources:
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-${BucketNamePrefix}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketLogging:
        DestinationBucketName: !If
          - EnableDataEventsLoggingCondition
          - !Sub 's3-logs-${AWS::AccountId}'
          - !Ref AWS::NoValue
        LogFilePrefix: !If
          - EnableDataEventsLoggingCondition
          - !Ref LoggingPrefix
          - !Ref AWS::NoValue
      Tags:
        - Key: Ownership
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !If [IsEnterpriseAccess, enterprise, single-account]
        - Key: AccessMode
          Value: !If [IsEnterpriseAccess, organization, single-account]

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SecureTransport': 'false'

          - Sid: OrgRestrictedAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - 's3:GetObject'
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:DeleteObject'
              - 's3:ListBucket'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:PrincipalOrgID': !Ref OrganizationId
                'aws:SecureTransport': 'true'

          - Sid: OpenSingleAccountAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - 's3:GetObject'
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:DeleteObject'
              - 's3:ListBucket'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                'aws:PrincipalOrgID': '*'
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SecureTransport': 'true'

  DataEventsLoggingBucket:
    Condition: EnableDataEventsLoggingCondition
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 's3-logs-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: S3DataEventsLogging

  DataEventsLoggingPolicy:
    Condition: EnableDataEventsLoggingCondition
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref DataEventsLoggingBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowEncryptedTransportOnly
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt DataEventsLoggingBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${DataEventsLoggingBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SecureTransport': 'false'
          - Sid: AllowLogDeliveryFromSourceBucket
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 's3:PutObject'
            Resource: !Sub '${DataEventsLoggingBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref SourceArn
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref AWS::AccountId

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketName'

  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketArn'

  BucketDomainName:
    Description: Domain name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt S3Bucket.DomainName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketDomainName'

  AccessMode:
    Description: Access mode derived from parameter: organization or single-account
    Value: !If [IsEnterpriseAccess, organization, single-account]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AccessMode'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Infrastructure template with VPC, Security Group, S3 Bucket, and DynamoDB Table with deletion protection.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Restrict outbound traffic to internal CIDR over HTTPS
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16

  KMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: Customer-managed KMS key for S3 encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KMSKey'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::Region

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}-bucket'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref KMSKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': 'false'

  DynamoDBTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}-table'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: partitionKey
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: sortKey
          AttributeType: N
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: partitionKey
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: sortKey
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Multi-AZ VPC with two public and two private subnets, route tables, and Internet routes.'

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC.
  PublicSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for the first public subnet.
  PublicSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for the second public subnet.
  PrivateSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.3.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for the first private subnet.
  PrivateSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.4.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for the second private subnet.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet1Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet1'

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet2Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet2'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable1'

  PrivateRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable2'

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a VPC, EC2 instance with HTTP access, and a secured S3 bucket.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  HTTPSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow HTTP access
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityGroup'

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref HTTPSecurityGroup
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpTokens: required
        HttpEndpoint: enabled
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 8
            Encrypted: true
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2Instance'
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}-bucket'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: alias/aws/s3
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3Bucket'
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: false

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c7217cdde317cfec
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0b2f6494ff0b07a06
    us-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0c55b159cbfafe1f0
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-0e6fe0944040460bc
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-05d22b69995da6931
    eu-west-2:
      AMI: ami-061ae10846dd516c8
    eu-west-3:
      AMI: ami-04ee1f885683bfa86
    eu-central-1:
      AMI: ami-0fc0d69b20ccf0575
    ap-southeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0e8770ba248631179
    ap-southeast-2:
      AMI: ami-0f12069648c143b29
    ap-northeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0e1217714069916a8
    ap-northeast-2:
      AMI: ami-018fe210369785196
    ap-south-1:
      AMI: ami-09c42da74a4511936
    sa-east-1:
      AMI: ami-073f25c1963a13419
    ca-central-1:
      AMI: ami-0b18956f

Outputs:
  InstancePublicIP:
    Description: 'Public IP address of the EC2 instance'
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicIp
  S3BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket'
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: CodeServerVPC

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: CodeServerPublicSubnet

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: CodeServerIGW

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: CodeServerPublicRouteTable

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: AttachGateway
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  CodeServerSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow inbound HTTP from CloudFront IP ranges and outbound port 8080
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: Allow HTTP from CloudFront (will be restricted via IPSet in practice)
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: Allow outbound to code-server on port 8080
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: Allow all outbound (demo trade-off)

  EC2InstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore

  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2InstanceRole

  CodeServerInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', SSMParam]
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref CodeServerSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      KeyName: ''
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 8
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash -xe
          export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
          apt-get update -y
          apt-get install -y curl gnupg
          curl -fsSL https://code-server.dev/install.sh | sh -s -- --version ${CodeServerVersion}
          # Start code-server bound to 0.0.0.0:8080 with no authentication
          code-server --bind-addr 0.0.0.0:8080 --auth none --disable-telemetry

  CodeServerEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref CodeServerInstance

  CloudFrontOriginAccessIdentity:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::CloudFrontOriginAccessIdentity
    Properties:
      CloudFrontOriginAccessIdentityConfig:
        Comment: Origin access identity for code-server demo

  CodeServerCloudFrontDistribution:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution
    Properties:
      DistributionConfig:
        Comment: Code-server CloudFront distribution (demo: open HTTP origin)
        Enabled: true
        PriceClass: PriceClass_All
        HttpVersion: http2
        DefaultCacheBehavior:
          TargetOriginId: CodeServerOrigin
          ViewerProtocolPolicy: allow-all
          ForwardedValues:
            QueryString: false
            Cookies:
              Forward: none
          MinTTL: 0
          DefaultTTL: 86400
          MaxTTL: 31536000
          Compress: true
        Origins:
          - Id: CodeServerOrigin
            DomainName: !GetAtt CodeServerEIP.PublicIp
            CustomOriginConfig:
              HTTPPort: 8080
              HTTPSPort: 443
              OriginProtocolPolicy: http-only
        Enabled: true
        ViewerCertificate:
          CloudFrontDefaultCertificate: true

Outputs:
  CloudFrontURL:
    Description: URL to access the code-server via CloudFront
    Value: !Sub https://${CodeServerCloudFrontDistribution.DomainName}
  CloudFrontDomainName:
    Description: CloudFront domain name
    Value: !Ref CodeServerCloudFrontDistribution
  InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 instance ID
    Value: !Ref CodeServerInstance
  PublicIP:
    Description: EC2 public IP address
    Value: !Ref CodeServerEIP
  SubnetId:
    Description: EC2 subnet ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Description: Security group attached to the EC2 instance
    Value: !Ref CodeServerSecurityGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  Amazon ECS cluster with Fargate and Fargate Spot capacity providers,
  Auto Scaling, least-privilege IAM, and tagged resources.

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Description: Environment tag (e.g., dev, staging, prod).
    Default: dev
  Owner:
    Type: String
    Description: Owner tag for cost allocation.
    Default: engineering
  KeyName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Description: EC2 Key Pair for instances.
    Default: ""
  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: VPC for the Auto Scaling group subnets.
  SubnetIds:
    Type: List<AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id>
    Description: Subnets for the Auto Scaling group.
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Description: EC2 instance type for the Auto Scaling group.
    Default: t3.micro
  ClusterName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the ECS cluster.
    Default: ecs-fargate-fargate-spot-cluster

Resources:
  ECSCluster:
    Type: AWS::ECS::Cluster
    Properties:
      ClusterName: !Sub ${ClusterName}-${Environment}
      CapacityProviders:
        - !Ref FargateCapacityProvider
        - !Ref FargateSpotCapacityProvider
      DefaultCapacityProviderStrategy:
        - CapacityProvider: !Ref FargateCapacityProvider
          Weight: 1
          Base: 0
        - CapacityProvider: !Ref FargateSpotCapacityProvider
          Weight: 1
          Base: 0
      Tags:
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: purpose
          Value: ecs-capacity-providers
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  FargateCapacityProvider:
    Type: AWS::ECS::CapacityProvider
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupProvider:
        AutoScalingGroupArn: !GetAtt FargateAutoScalingGroup.Arn
        ManagedScaling:
          Status: ENABLED
          TargetCapacity: 80
          MinimumScalingStepSize: 1
          MaximumScalingStepSize: 10
        ManagedTerminationProtection: ENABLED

  FargateSpotCapacityProvider:
    Type: AWS::ECS::CapacityProvider
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupProvider:
        AutoScalingGroupArn: !GetAtt FargateSpotAutoScalingGroup.Arn
        ManagedScaling:
          Status: ENABLED
          TargetCapacity: 80
          MinimumScalingStepSize: 1
          MaximumScalingStepSize: 10
        ManagedTerminationProtection: ENABLED

  ClusterCapacityProviderAssociations:
    Type: AWS::ECS::ClusterCapacityProviderAssociations
    Properties:
      Cluster: !Ref ECSCluster
      CapacityProviders:
        - !Ref FargateCapacityProvider
        - !Ref FargateSpotCapacityProvider
      DefaultCapacityProviderStrategy:
        - CapacityProvider: !GetAtt FargateCapacityProvider.Arn
          Weight: 1
          Base: 0
        - CapacityProvider: !GetAtt FargateSpotCapacityProvider.Arn
          Weight: 1
          Base: 0

  FargateLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub fargate-lt-${Environment}
      LaunchTemplateData:
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        KeyName: !Ref KeyName
        ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref "AWS::Region", AMI]
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            Groups:
              - !GetAtt InstanceSecurityGroup.GroupId
            DeleteOnTermination: true
        UserData: !Base64 |
          #!/bin/bash
          echo "Fargate capacity provider node - do not install Docker or ECS agent manually"

  FargateSpotLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub fargate-spot-lt-${Environment}
      LaunchTemplateData:
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        KeyName: !Ref KeyName
        ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref "AWS::Region", AMI]
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            Groups:
              - !GetAtt InstanceSecurityGroup.GroupId
            DeleteOnTermination: true
        UserData: !Base64 |
          #!/bin/bash
          echo "Fargate Spot capacity provider node - do not install Docker or ECS agent manually"

  FargateAutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      VPCZoneIdentifier: !Ref SubnetIds
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateName: !Ref FargateLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt FargateLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: "0"
      MaxSize: "10"
      DesiredCapacity: "0"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub fargate-asg-${Environment}
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
        - Key: purpose
          Value: ecs-fargate
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  FargateSpotAutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      VPCZoneIdentifier: !Ref SubnetIds
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateName: !Ref FargateSpotLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt FargateSpotLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: "0"
      MaxSize: "10"
      DesiredCapacity: "0"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub fargate-spot-asg-${Environment}
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
        - Key: environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
        - Key: purpose
          Value: ecs-fargate-spot
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
        - Key: owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  InstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          Effect: Allow
          Principal:
            Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
          Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonEC2ContainerServiceforEC2Role

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for ECS capacity provider instances.
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0b22c49121e609f50
    us-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0f26b22d373d04484
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-05e12514cd1c58d4c
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-09d3b3274b6c5d5aa
    eu-west-2:
      AMI: ami-03490e62037563577
    eu-west-3:
      AMI: ami-04eeafaf521ae84aa
    eu-central-1:
      AMI: ami-0fc0d204ed4800401
    ap-southeast-1:
      AMI: ami-05e9965a55e811347
    ap-southeast-2:
      AMI: ami-00a1822477757aacd
    ap-northeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0e1217729ec7ab619
    ap-northeast-2:
      AMI: ami-02805265540126389
    ap-south-1:
      AMI: ami-0843d2ce442b83e62
    sa-east-1:
      AMI: ami-077469e643490b0de
    ca-central-1:
      AMI: ami-0b18956f

Outputs:
  ClusterName:
    Description: Name of the ECS cluster.
    Value: !Ref ECSCluster
  ClusterArn:
    Description: ARN of the ECS cluster.
    Value: !GetAtt ECSCluster.Arn
  FargateCapacityProviderName:
    Description: Name of the Fargate capacity provider.
    Value: !Ref FargateCapacityProvider
  FargateCapacityProviderArn:
    Description: ARN of the Fargate capacity provider.
    Value: !GetAtt FargateCapacityProvider.Arn
  FargateSpotCapacityProviderName:
    Description: Name of the Fargate Spot capacity provider.
    Value: !Ref FargateSpotCapacityProvider
  FargateSpotCapacityProviderArn:
    Description: ARN of the Fargate Spot capacity provider.
    Value: !GetAtt FargateSpotCapacityProvider.Arn
  FargateAutoScalingGroupName:
    Description: Auto Scaling group name for Fargate capacity provider.
    Value: !Ref FargateAutoScalingGroup
  FargateSpotAutoScalingGroupName:
    Description: Auto Scaling group name for Fargate Spot capacity provider.
    Value: !Ref FargateSpotAutoScalingGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'ECS Fargate Task Definition with IAM Roles and CloudWatch Logs for NGINX Demo'

Resources:
  EcsLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: /ecs/nginxdemo
      RetentionInDays: 7
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EcsFargateDemo

  TaskExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonECSTaskExecutionRolePolicy
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EcsFargateDemo

  TaskRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SSMSessionManagement
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:StartSession
                  - ssm:SendCommand
                  - ssm:DescribeInstanceInformation
                  - ssm:GetConnectionStatus
                  - ssm:StopSession
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EcsFargateDemo

  TaskDefinition:
    Type: AWS::ECS::TaskDefinition
    Properties:
      Family: nginxdemo-task
      Cpu: '512'
      Memory: '1024'
      NetworkMode: awsvpc
      RequiresCompatibilities:
        - FARGATE
      ExecutionRoleArn: !GetAtt TaskExecutionRole.Arn
      TaskRoleArn: !GetAtt TaskRole.Arn
      ContainerDefinitions:
        - Name: nginx
          Image: nginx:latest
          Essential: true
          PortMappings:
            - ContainerPort: 80
              HostPort: 80
              Protocol: tcp
          LogConfiguration:
            LogDriver: awslogs
            Options:
              awslogs-group: !Ref EcsLogGroup
              awslogs-region: !Ref AWS::Region
              awslogs-stream-prefix: ecs
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EcsFargateDemo

Outputs:
  TaskDefinitionArn:
    Description: ARN of the ECS Task Definition
    Value: !Ref TaskDefinition
  TaskRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the ECS Task Role
    Value: !GetAtt TaskRole.Arn
  ExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the ECS Task Execution Role
    Value: !GetAtt TaskExecutionRole.Arn
  LogGroupName:
    Description: CloudWatch Log Group Name
    Value: !Ref EcsLogGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Windows EC2 CPU Stress Testing Stack with SSM Integration'

Parameters:
  WindowsAmiSsmPath:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
    Description: SSM Parameter path for the latest Windows Server 2019 AMI
    Default: /aws/service/ami-windows-latest/Windows_Server-2019-English-Full-Base

  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Description: EC2 instance type for the stress test target
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.nano
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
      - t3.large
    Default: t3.medium

  SubnetIds:
    Type: List<AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id>
    Description: List of subnet IDs for the instance. If empty, the default VPC's first subnet will be used.
    Default: []

  KeyName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Description: Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair to enable SSH access
    Default: ''

  SsmDocumentName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name for the custom SSM document
    Default: Windows-Cpu-Stress-Test-Document

  LogGroupName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name for the CloudWatch Log Group
    Default: /aws/ec2/windows-cpu-stress-test

Resources:
  ExecutionLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Ref LogGroupName
      RetentionInDays: 14

  Ec2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CloudWatchLogsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:DescribeLogGroups
                  - logs:DescribeLogStreams
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:${LogGroupName}:*'

  Ec2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Path: /
      Roles:
        - !Ref Ec2Role

  CpuStressDocument:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref SsmDocumentName
      DocumentType: Command
      DocumentFormat: YAML
      Content:
        schemaVersion: '2.2'
        description: 'Windows CPU Stress Test Document'
        parameters:
          durationSeconds:
            type: String
            description: Duration of the stress test in seconds
            default: '300'
          threadCount:
            type: String
            description: Number of threads to spawn for CPU stress
            default: '1'
        mainSteps:
          - action: aws:runPowerShellScript
            name: cpuStress
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - |
                  $duration = [int]"{{ durationSeconds }}"
                  $threads = [int]"{{ threadCount }}"
                  Write-Output "Starting CPU stress test: $threads threads for $duration seconds"

                  $scriptBlock = {
                      param($endTime)
                      while ((Get-Date) -lt $endTime) {
                          $null = [math]::Pow([math]::Sqrt([math]::PI), 2)
                      }
                  }

                  $endTime = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($duration)
                  $runspacePool = [runspacefactory]::CreateRunspacePool(1, $threads)
                  $runspacePool.Open()

                  $jobs = @()
                  for ($i = 0; $i -lt $threads; $i++) {
                      $powershell = [powershell]::Create().AddScript($scriptBlock).AddArgument($endTime)
                      $powershell.RunspacePool = $runspacePool
                      $job = [PSCustomObject]@{
                          Handle = $powershell.BeginInvoke()
                          PowerShell = $powershell
                      }
                      $jobs += $job
                  }

                  $jobs | ForEach-Object { $_.PowerShell.EndInvoke($_.Handle) }
                  $runspacePool.Close()
                  $runspacePool.Dispose()
                  Write-Output "CPU stress test completed."

  FisRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: fis.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FISExecutionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:SendCommand
                  - ssm:ListCommands
                  - ssm:GetCommandInvocation
                  - ssm:DescribeDocument
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:DescribeInstances
                  - ec2:DescribeImages
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudwatch:PutMetricData
                Resource: '*'

  VpcSelectorFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import cfnresponse
          import boto3
          import json

          def get_default_vpc_subnet():
              ec2 = boto3.client('ec2')
              vpcs = ec2.describe_vpcs(Filters=[{'Name': 'isDefault', 'Values': ['true']}])['Vpcs']
              if not vpcs:
                  raise Exception('No default VPC found')
              default_vpc_id = vpcs[0]['VpcId']
              subnets = ec2.describe_subnets(Filters=[{'Name': 'vpc-id', 'Values': [default_vpc_id]}])['Subnets']
              if not subnets:
                  raise Exception('No subnets found in default VPC')
              return subnets[0]['SubnetId']

          def handler(event, context):
              try:
                  if event['RequestType'] in ['Create', 'Update']:
                      subnet_ids = event.get('ResourceProperties', {}).get('SubnetIds', [])
                      if subnet_ids:
                          selected = subnet_ids[0]
                      else:
                          selected = get_default_vpc_subnet()
                      cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.SUCCESS, {'SubnetId': selected})
                  else:
                      cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.SUCCESS, {})
              except Exception as e:
                  cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.FAILED, {'Error': str(e)})
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt VpcSelectorFunctionRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.14
      Timeout: 30

  VpcSelectorFunctionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: VpcSelectorPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:DescribeVpcs
                  - ec2:DescribeSubnets
                Resource: '*'

  VpcSelectorFunctionExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaBasicExecution
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'

  StressTestInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref WindowsAmiSsmPath
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref Ec2InstanceProfile
      SubnetId: !GetAtt VpcSelector.SelectedSubnet

  VpcSelector:
    Type: Custom::VpcSelector
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt VpcSelectorFunction.Arn
      SubnetIds: !Ref SubnetIds

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: The Instance ID of the Windows stress test target
    Value: !Ref StressTestInstance

  SsmDocumentName:
    Description: Name of the custom SSM document
    Value: !Ref SsmDocumentName

  CloudWatchLogGroupName:
    Description: CloudWatch Log Group for SSM command logs
    Value: !Ref LogGroupName

  FisRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the FIS IAM role
    Value: !GetAtt FisRole.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  IAM roles with tiered permissions for FIS access control.
  Defines SecurityAdmins, Admins, Users, and NonUsers roles with granular policies.

Metadata:
  AWS::CloudFormation::Interface:
    ParameterGroups:
      - Label:
          default: Workshop Configuration
        Parameters:
          - WorkshopServiceRolePrefix
          - WorkshopAccountIds

Parameters:
  WorkshopServiceRolePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: arn:aws:iam::
    Description: Prefix for workshop-specific service roles (e.g., arn:aws:iam::).
  WorkshopAccountIds:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: ''
    Description: Comma-separated list of workshop account IDs for role-passing restrictions.

Resources:
  SecurityAdmins:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
                - ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FullFISAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: fis:*
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: PassWorkshopServiceRoles
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:PassRole
                Resource: !Sub '${WorkshopServiceRolePrefix}*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    iam:PassedToService:
                      - fis.amazonaws.com
        - PolicyName: CreateServiceLinkedRole
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:CreateServiceLinkedRole
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringLike:
                    iam:AWSServiceName: fis.amazonaws.com

  Admins:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
                - ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DenyFISProdTaggedResources
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Deny
                Action: fis:*
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    aws:RequestTag/Environment: prod
              - Effect: Deny
                Action: fis:*
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    aws:ResourceTag/Environment: prod
        - PolicyName: PassFISConditionalRoles
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:PassRole
                Resource: !Sub '${WorkshopServiceRolePrefix}*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    iam:PassedToService: fis.amazonaws.com

  Users:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
                - ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FISExperimentActions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - fis:StartExperiment
                  - fis:StopExperiment
                  - fis:List*
                  - fis:TagResource
                  - fis:Get*
                  - fis:Describe*
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringNotEquals:
                    aws:RequestTag/Environment: prod
              - Effect: Deny
                Action: fis:*
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    aws:ResourceTag/Environment: prod
        - PolicyName: RestrictPassRole
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Deny
                Action: iam:PassRole
                Resource: '*'

  NonUsers:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
                - ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DenyAllFIS
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Deny
                Action: fis:*
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: RestrictPassRoleAndAdmin
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - iam:PassRole
                  - iam:CreateServiceLinkedRole
                  - iam:*
                Resource: '*'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Environment-specific DynamoDB tables for supporter product data with PROD (provisioned with auto-scaling) and CODE (on-demand) configurations.'

Parameters:
  Stage:
    Type: String
    Description: Environment stage to determine table configuration (PROD or CODE).
    AllowedValues:
      - PROD
      - CODE

Conditions:
  IsProd: !Equals [!Ref Stage, PROD]
  IsCode: !Equals [!Ref Stage, CODE]
  CreateScalingTarget: !Equals [!Ref Stage, PROD]
  CreateScalingPolicy: !Equals [!Ref Stage, PROD]
  CreateScalingRole: !Equals [!Ref Stage, PROD]
  CreateBackup: !Equals [!Ref Stage, PROD]

Resources:
  SupporterProductDataTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub SupporterProductData-${Stage}
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: id
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: id
          KeyType: HASH
      BillingMode: !If
        - IsProd
        - PROVISIONED
        - PAY_PER_REQUEST
      ProvisionedThroughput: !If
        - IsProd
        - ReadCapacityUnits: 20
          WriteCapacityUnits: 5
        - !Ref AWS::NoValue
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      TimeToLiveSpecification:
        AttributeName: expiryDate
        Enabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Stage

  ProdWriteAutoScalingTarget:
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalableTarget
    Condition: CreateScalingTarget
    Properties:
      MaxCapacity: 500
      MinCapacity: 5
      ResourceId: !Sub table/${SupporterProductDataTable}/index/write
      RoleARN: !GetAtt AutoScalingRole.Arn
      ScalableDimension: dynamodb:table:WriteCapacityUnits
      ServiceNamespace: dynamodb

  ProdWriteScalingPolicy:
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Condition: CreateScalingPolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: DynamoDBWriteCapacityTargetTracking
      PolicyType: TargetTrackingScaling
      ScalingTargetId: !Ref ProdWriteAutoScalingTarget
      TargetTrackingScalingPolicyConfiguration:
        TargetValue: 70.0
        PredefinedMetricSpecification:
          PredefinedMetricType: DynamoDBWriteCapacityUtilization
        ScaleInCooldown: 60
        ScaleOutCooldown: 60

  AutoScalingRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Condition: CreateScalingRole
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: application-autoscaling.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DynamoDBAutoScalingPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:DescribeTable
                  - dynamodb:DescribeContinuousBackups
                  - dynamodb:ListTagsOfResource
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - application-autoscaling:DeleteScalingPolicy
                  - application-autoscaling:DescribeScalableTargets
                  - application-autoscaling:DescribeScalingPolicies
                  - application-autoscaling:RegisterScalableTarget
                Resource: '*'

  BackupPlan:
    Type: AWS::Backup::BackupPlan
    Condition: CreateBackup
    Properties:
      BackupPlan:
        BackupPlanName: !Sub SupporterProductData-${Stage}-BackupPlan
        Rules:
          - RuleName: DailyBackup
            TargetBackupVault: !Ref BackupVault
            ScheduleExpression: 'cron(0 5 ? * ? *)'
            StartWindowMinutes: 60
            CompletionWindowMinutes: 180
            Lifecycle:
              DeleteAfterDays: 30
              MoveToColdStorageAfterDays: 7

  BackupVault:
    Type: AWS::Backup::BackupVault
    Condition: CreateBackup
    Properties:
      BackupVaultName: !Sub SupporterProductData-${Stage}-BackupVault
      EncryptionKeyArn: !GetAtt BackupKey.Arn
      BackupVaultTags:
        Environment: !Ref Stage

  BackupKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Condition: CreateBackup
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Id: !Sub key-policy-${Stage}
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow Backup Service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: backup.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      Enabled: true
      Description: !Sub KMS key for ${Stage} DynamoDB backups

  BackupSelection:
    Type: AWS::Backup::BackupSelection
    Condition: CreateBackup
    Properties:
      BackupPlanId: !Ref BackupPlan
      Selection:
        IamRoleArn: !GetAtt BackupRole.Arn
        SelectionTags:
          - ConditionType: STRINGEQUALS
            ConditionKey: Environment
            ConditionValue: !Ref Stage
            SelectionName: !Sub SupporterProductData-${Stage}-Selection

  BackupRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Condition: CreateBackup
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: backup.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: BackupSelectionAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:DescribeTable
                  - dynamodb:DescribeContinuousBackups
                  - dynamodb:ListTagsOfResource
                Resource: '*'

  IsCodeNoop:
    Type: AWS::CloudFormation::WaitConditionHandle
    Condition: IsCode

Outputs:
  TableName:
    Description: Name of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !Ref SupporterProductDataTable
  TableArn:
    Description: ARN of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !GetAtt SupporterProductDataTable.Arn
  BillingMode:
    Description: Billing mode of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !If
      - IsProd
      - PROVISIONED
      - PAY_PER_REQUEST
  Environment:
    Description: Stage of the deployment
    Value: !Ref Stage
  AutoScalingEnabled:
    Description: Whether auto-scaling is enabled for write capacity
    Value: !If
      - IsProd
      - true
      - false

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates an AWS EC2 IP Address Manager (IPAM) with default public and private scopes, and exports critical identifiers for cross-stack referencing.'

Resources:
  IPAM:
    Type: AWS::EC2::IPAM
    Properties: 
      Description: 'IPAM for managing IP address allocation across accounts and regions'
      Tags: 
        - Key: Name
          Value: 'DefaultIPAM'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: 'Production'

Outputs:
  IPAMId:
    Description: 'The unique ID of the IPAM'
    Value: !Ref IPAM
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IPAM-Id'

  IPAMArn:
    Description: 'The ARN of the IPAM'
    Value: !GetAtt IPAM.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IPAM-Arn'

  DefaultPrivateScopeId:
    Description: 'The ID of the default private scope'
    Value: !GetAtt IPAM.PrivateDefaultScopeId
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IPAM-DefaultPrivateScopeId'

  DefaultPublicScopeId:
    Description: 'The ID of the default public scope'
    Value: !GetAtt IPAM.PublicDefaultScopeId
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IPAM-DefaultPublicScopeId'
