AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  IAM Managed Policies for iOS App S3 Access, DynamoDB Protection, and RDS Protection.

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket (e.g., ios-apps.sagebridge.org).
    Default: ios-apps.sagebridge.org

Resources:
  S3AccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: S3AccessPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowiOSAppS3ReadWrite
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: !Sub arn:aws:s3:::${BucketName}/*
          - Sid: AllowiOSAppS3ListBucket
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource: !Sub arn:aws:s3:::${BucketName}
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                s3:prefix:
                  - ""
                  - "*"
      Roles: []
      Groups: []

  DynamoDBProtectionPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: DynamoDBProtectionPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyDestructiveDynamoDBActions
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - dynamodb:DeleteTable
              - dynamodb:UpdateTable
              - dynamodb:CreateTable
              - dynamodb:RestoreTableFromBackup
              - dynamodb:RestoreTableToPointInTime
              - dynamodb:ImportTable
              - dynamodb:ExportTableToPointInTime
            Resource: "*"
      Roles: []
      Groups: []

  RDSProtectionPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: RDSProtectionPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyDestructiveRDSActions
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - rds:DeleteDBInstance
              - rds:DeleteDBCluster
            Resource: "*"
      Roles: []
      Groups: []

Outputs:
  S3AccessPolicyArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 Access Policy managed policy.
    Value: !GetAtt S3AccessPolicy.PolicyArn
  DynamoDBProtectionPolicyArn:
    Description: ARN of the DynamoDB Protection Policy managed policy.
    Value: !GetAtt DynamoDBProtectionPolicy.PolicyArn
  RDSProtectionPolicyArn:
    Description: ARN of the RDS Protection Policy managed policy.
    Value: !GetAtt RDSProtectionPolicy.PolicyArn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  IAM Role for Bedrock agent integration with least-privilege permissions
  and scoped Lambda invocation capabilities.

Parameters:
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function to grant invoke permission
    Default: arn:aws:lambda:us-east-1:123456789012:function:placeholder
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Description: Environment tag value (e.g., dev, staging, prod)
    Default: dev

Resources:
  BedrockAgentRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub 'bedrock-agent-${Environment}-role'
      Path: /application/
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: bedrock.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
              ArnLike:
                bedrock:Resource: arn:aws:bedrock:*:*:agent/agent/*
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: BedrockInvokeModelAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - bedrock:InvokeModel
                  - bedrock:InvokeModelWithResponseStream
                Resource: arn:aws:bedrock:*:*:agent/agent/*
        - PolicyName: LambdaInvokeFunctionAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !Ref LambdaFunctionArn

Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Bedrock agent IAM role
    Value: !GetAtt BedrockAgentRole.Arn
  RoleName:
    Description: Name of the Bedrock agent IAM role
    Value: !Ref BedrockAgentRole

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Creates an AWS Resource Group with tag-based filters to dynamically include resources such as EC2 and RDS based on common tags. Supports multi-account multi-region deployment via StackSets.

Parameters:
  EnvironmentTagKey:
    Type: String
    Default: Environment
    Description: Key name for the environment tag used in inclusion filters.
  ApplicationTagKey:
    Type: String
    Default: Application
    Description: Key name for the application tag used in inclusion filters.
  OwnerTagKey:
    Type: String
    Default: Owner
    Description: Key name for the owner tag used in inclusion filters.
  EnvironmentTagValue:
    Type: String
    Default: production
    Description: Value of the environment tag to include in the filter.
  ApplicationTagValue:
    Type: String
    Default: myapp
    Description: Value of the application tag to include in the filter.
  OwnerTagValue:
    Type: String
    Default: team-ops
    Description: Value of the owner tag to include in the filter.
  GroupName:
    Type: String
    Default: TaggedInstancesGroup
    Description: Name for the Resource Group.

Resources:
  TaggedInstancesResourceGroup:
    Type: AWS::ResourceGroups::Group
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref GroupName
      Description: Creates an AWS Resource Group with tag-based filters to dynamically include resources such as EC2 and RDS based on common tags. Supports multi-account multi-region deployment via StackSets.
      ResourceQuery:
        Query: !Sub '{"ResourceTypeFilters":["AWS::EC2::Instance","AWS::RDS::DBInstance"],"TagFilters":[{"Key":"${EnvironmentTagKey}","Values":["${EnvironmentTagValue}"]},{"Key":"${ApplicationTagKey}","Values":["${ApplicationTagValue}"]},{"Key":"${OwnerTagKey}","Values":["${OwnerTagValue}"]}]}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: GovernanceGroup

Outputs:
  GroupId:
    Description: The unique identifier of the Resource Group.
    Value: !Ref TaggedInstancesResourceGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-GroupId"
  GroupArn:
    Description: The ARN of the Resource Group.
    Value: !GetAtt TaggedInstancesResourceGroup.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-GroupArn"
  GroupNameOutput:
    Description: The name of the Resource Group.
    Value: !Ref TaggedInstancesResourceGroup

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  Creates an encrypted, private S3 bucket for ALB access logs with enforced ownership,
  public access block, 90-day lifecycle rule, KMS encryption, and a restrictive bucket policy.

Metadata:
  Purpose: ALB Access Logs Storage
  Compliance: Aligns with AWS ALB logging best practices and security baselines.
  Ownership: Centralized via BucketOwnerEnforced and explicit bucket policy.
  Encryption: aws:kms (CMK) applied for data-at-rest.
  Retention: 90-day automatic expiration for cost control and log lifecycle.

Resources:
  ALBAccessLogsKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for ALB access logs bucket encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Id: key-policy
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 encryption and decryption
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:Encrypt
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ALBAccessLogsKMSKey
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: ALBAccessLogs

  ALBAccessLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 'albaccesslogs-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref ALBAccessLogsKMSKey
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: ExpireAfter90Days
            Status: Enabled
            ExpirationInDays: 90
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ALBAccessLogsBucket
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: ALBAccessLogs

  ALBAccessLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ALBAccessLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowELBAndDeliveryLogsWrite
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub '${ALBAccessLogsBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount:
                  - !Ref AWS::AccountId
                  - 'delivery.logs.amazonaws.com'
                kms:ViaService: !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'true'

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the ALB access logs bucket
    Value: !Ref ALBAccessLogsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the ALB access logs bucket
    Value: !GetAtt ALBAccessLogsBucket.Arn
  KMSKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key used for bucket encryption
    Value: !GetAtt ALBAccessLogsKMSKey.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys a Transit Gateway and a RAM Resource Share for cross-account network connectivity.

Resources:
  TransitGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::TransitGateway
    Properties:
      Description: Transit Gateway for centralized cross-VPC and cross-account routing.
      DefaultRouteTableAssociation: enable
      DefaultRouteTablePropagation: enable
      DnsSupport: enable
      TransitGatewayCidrBlocks:
        - 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TransitGateway'

  TransitGatewayRAMResourceShare:
    Type: AWS::RAM::ResourceShare
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TransitGatewayShare'
      ResourceArns:
        - !Ref TransitGateway
      Principals:
        - '644519422710'
      PermissionArns: []
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RAMResourceShare'

Outputs:
  TransitGatewayId:
    Description: The ID of the Transit Gateway for VPC attachment integrations.
    Value: !Ref TransitGateway
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TransitGatewayId'

  ResourceShareId:
    Description: The ID of the RAM Resource Share for cross-account sharing.
    Value: !Ref TransitGatewayRAMResourceShare
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ResourceShareId'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'AWS Macie Session with Secure S3, CloudWatch, SNS, and IAM for multi-account sensitive data discovery'

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Description: Prefix for the S3 bucket name used by Macie
    Default: macie-findings
  RetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Description: Retention period in days for CloudWatch Log Group
    Default: 365
  AllowedAccountIds:
    Type: String
    Description: Comma-separated list of AWS Account IDs allowed to access the S3 bucket
    Default: ''
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Description: Environment tag (e.g., dev, staging, prod)
    Default: production
  Application:
    Type: String
    Description: Application name tag
    Default: macie-security
  Owner:
    Type: String
    Description: Owner tag for cost allocation
    Default: security-team

Resources:
  MacieSessionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: MacieSessionRole
      Path: /
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: macie.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSMacieRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  MacieKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Id: key-default-1
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow Macie role to use key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt MacieSessionRole.Arn
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:Encrypt
            Resource: '*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  MacieKMSAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/macie-s3-encryption
      TargetKeyId: !Ref MacieKMSKey

  MacieFindingsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref MacieKMSKey
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  MacieFindingsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref MacieFindingsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceTLS
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt MacieFindingsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${MacieFindingsBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'
          - Sid: AllowMacieRole
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt MacieSessionRole.Arn
            Action:
              - s3:GetBucket*
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt MacieFindingsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${MacieFindingsBucket.Arn}/*'
          - Sid: AllowAuthorizedAccounts
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - s3:GetBucket*
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt MacieFindingsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${MacieFindingsBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Split [',', !Ref AllowedAccountIds]
          - Sid: DenyNonTLSUploads
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub '${MacieFindingsBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'

  MacieObjectLogBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-logs-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref MacieKMSKey
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  MacieObjectLogBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref MacieObjectLogBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceTLS
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt MacieObjectLogBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${MacieObjectLogBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'
          - Sid: AllowMacieRole
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt MacieSessionRole.Arn
            Action:
              - s3:GetBucket*
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt MacieObjectLogBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${MacieObjectLogBucket.Arn}/*'

  MacieLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/macie/session/${AWS::AccountId}'
      RetentionInDays: !Ref RetentionDays
      KmsKeyId: !Ref MacieKMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  MacieFindingTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: MacieFindingAlerts
      Subscription: []
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner

  MacieFindingRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.macie
        detail-type:
          - Macie Finding
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Arn: !Ref MacieFindingTopic
          Id: MacieFindingTarget

  # AWS::Macie2::Session is not available in us-east-1; omitted per fix objective.
  # Macie session must be managed outside CloudFormation in this region.

Outputs:
  MacieSessionRoleArn:
    Description: IAM Role ARN assumed by Macie
    Value: !GetAtt MacieSessionRole.Arn
  MacieFindingsBucketName:
    Description: S3 Bucket for Macie findings
    Value: !Ref MacieFindingsBucket
  MacieObjectLogBucketName:
    Description: S3 Bucket for Macie object logs
    Value: !Ref MacieObjectLogBucket
  MacieLogGroupName:
    Description: CloudWatch Log Group for Macie logs
    Value: !Ref MacieLogGroup
  MacieFindingTopicArn:
    Description: SNS Topic for Macie findings
    Value: !Ref MacieFindingTopic

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure and cost-optimized S3 bucket for CloudWatch export data with versioning and lifecycle management'

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Description: 'Prefix for the S3 bucket name. Account ID and region will be appended for uniqueness'
    Default: cloudwatch-export-data
  EnableVersioning:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Default: 'true'
    Description: 'Enable or disable versioning on the S3 bucket'
  TransitionToIAAfterDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    Description: 'Number of days after which current objects transition to S3 Standard-IA'
  NoncurrentVersionTransitionToIAAfterDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    Description: 'Number of days after which noncurrent objects transition to S3 Standard-IA'
  NoncurrentVersionExpirationAfterDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 365
    Description: 'Number of days after which noncurrent objects are permanently deleted'
  KMSKeyArn:
    Type: String
    Description: 'ARN of the KMS key for encryption (leave empty for AES256)'
    Default: ''

Conditions:
  UseKMS: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KMSKeyArn, '']]
  IsVersioningEnabled: !Equals [!Ref EnableVersioning, 'true']

Resources:
  CloudWatchExportBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              KMSMasterKeyID: !If [UseKMS, !Ref KMSKeyArn, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
              SSEAlgorithm: !If [UseKMS, aws:kms, AES256]
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: !If [IsVersioningEnabled, Enabled, Suspended]
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: TransitionCurrentObjectsToIA
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToIAAfterDays
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
          - Id: TransitionNoncurrentVersionsToIA
            Status: Enabled
            NoncurrentVersionTransitions:
              - NoncurrentDays: !Ref NoncurrentVersionTransitionToIAAfterDays
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
          - Id: ExpireNoncurrentVersions
            Status: Enabled
            NoncurrentVersionExpirationInDays: !Ref NoncurrentVersionExpirationAfterDays

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref CloudWatchExportBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnEncryptedObjectUploads
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub '${CloudWatchExportBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption: 'aws:kms'
              'ForAnyValue:StringEquals':
                s3:ExistingObjectTags: 'encrypted=true'
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt CloudWatchExportBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${CloudWatchExportBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchAndIAMRoleAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt CloudWatchExportBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${CloudWatchExportBucket.Arn}/*'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'AWS GuardDuty Detector with S3, SNS, IAM, and CloudWatch integration for continuous security monitoring of EC2 instances.'
Metadata:
  AWS::CloudFormation::Interface:
    ParameterGroups:
      - Label:
          default: 'GuardDuty Configuration'
        Parameters: []
Resources:
  GuardDutyIAMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: guardduty.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonGuardDutyReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: GuardDutyS3PublishingPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:PutObjectAcl
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
                  - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Security
        - Key: Application
          Value: GuardDuty
        - Key: Security
          Value: Monitoring
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: ExpirationRule
            Status: Enabled
            ExpirationInDays: 365
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Security
        - Key: Application
          Value: GuardDuty
        - Key: Security
          Value: Findings
  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: GuardDutyWriteAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt GuardDutyIAMRole.Arn
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
          - Sid: SecureTransportOnly
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'S3 bucket for Lambda artifacts with public access and KMS key with rotation and granular IAM policies'

Parameters:
  ServiceRoleName:
    Type: String
    Description: 'Name of the imported service role to grant KMS usage permissions'
    Default: LambdaArtifactsServiceRole

Resources:
  ArtifactsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 'lambda-artifacts-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref ArtifactsKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true

  ArtifactsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ArtifactsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowRootReadAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - 's3:GetBucket*'
              - 's3:List*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt ArtifactsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${ArtifactsBucket.Arn}/*'

  ArtifactsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for encrypting Lambda artifacts and static assets'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Id: key-policy
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowRootFullAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowServiceRoleUsage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${ServiceRoleName}'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Encrypt'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowRootUsageFromServiceRole
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Encrypt'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'

  ArtifactsKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${AWS::StackName}-artifacts-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref ArtifactsKey

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket for Lambda artifacts'
    Value: !Ref ArtifactsBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketName'

  S3BucketDomainName:
    Description: 'Domain name of the S3 bucket'
    Value: !GetAtt ArtifactsBucket.DomainName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketDomainName'

  KMSKeyARN:
    Description: 'ARN of the KMS key used for encryption'
    Value: !GetAtt ArtifactsKey.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KMSKeyARN'

  KMSKeyAlias:
    Description: 'Alias ARN for the KMS key'
    Value: !Ref ArtifactsKeyAlias
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KMSKeyAlias'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: IAM Role for AWS Service Catalog to provision and manage S3 and Lambda resources with granular permissions.

Resources:
  ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole
      Path: /
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: servicecatalog.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonS3FullAccess
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: IAMRoleAndPolicyManagement
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - iam:CreateRole
                  - iam:CreatePolicy
                  - iam:AttachRolePolicy
                  - iam:PutRolePolicy
                  - iam:DeleteRolePolicy
                  - iam:DeleteRole
                  - iam:DetachRolePolicy
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: LambdaLifecycleActions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:CreateFunction
                  - lambda:UpdateFunctionCode
                  - lambda:UpdateFunctionConfiguration
                  - lambda:DeleteFunction
                  - lambda:GetFunction
                  - lambda:ListFunctions
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: CloudFormationStackOperations
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudformation:CreateStack
                  - cloudformation:UpdateStack
                  - cloudformation:DeleteStack
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStacks
                  - cloudformation:ExecuteChangeSet
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: SNSIntegration
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sns:Publish
                  - sns:CreateTopic
                  - sns:Subscribe
                  - sns:ListTopics
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: ServiceCatalogSpecificPermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - servicecatalog:ProvisionProduct
                  - servicecatalog:DescribeProvisionedProduct
                  - servicecatalog:TerminateProvisionedProduct
                  - servicecatalog:ScanProvisionedProducts
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: LoggingAndMonitoring
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - cloudtrail:LookupEvents
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: ServiceCatalogProvisioning

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for EC2 Image Builder automation with secure logging'

Resources:
  ImageBuilderLogBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 'image-builder-logs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerPreferred
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Sub 'arn:aws:kms:${AWS::Region}:aws:key/aws/s3'

  ImageBuilderLogBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ImageBuilderLogBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceTLSForLogOperations
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt ImageBuilderLogBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${ImageBuilderLogBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: false

  ImageBuilderEC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub 'ImageBuilder-EC2-Role-${AWS::Region}'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ImageBuilderS3Access
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: !GetAtt ImageBuilderLogBucket.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                Resource: !Sub '${ImageBuilderLogBucket.Arn}/*'

  ImageBuilderInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: !Sub 'ImageBuilder-InstanceProfile-${AWS::Region}'
      Roles:
        - !Ref ImageBuilderEC2Role

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket for storing Image Builder logs'
    Value: !Ref ImageBuilderLogBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LogBucketName'

  InstanceProfileName:
    Description: 'Name of the IAM Instance Profile for EC2 Image Builder'
    Value: !Ref ImageBuilderInstanceProfile
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceProfileName'

  IAMRoleName:
    Description: 'Name of the IAM Role for EC2 Image Builder'
    Value: !Ref ImageBuilderEC2Role
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IAMRoleName'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: S3 bucket for storing VPC flow logs with lifecycle management and strict access controls.

Metadata:
  AWS::CloudFormation::Interface:
    ParameterGroups:
      - Label:
          default: "Bucket Naming"
        Parameters:
          - BucketName
      - Label:
          default: "Versioning and Lifecycle"
        Parameters:
          - BucketVersioningStatus
          - TransitionDays
          - RetentionDays
      - Label:
          default: "Encryption"
        Parameters:
          - KmsMasterKeyId
      - Label:
          default: "Security and Access"
        Parameters: []

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Description: Optional custom name for the S3 bucket. If not provided, a unique name will be generated.
    Default: ""
    AllowedPattern: "^[a-z0-9\\-]{0,63}$"
    ConstraintDescription: Must contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. Max 63 characters.
  BucketVersioningStatus:
    Type: String
    Description: Versioning status for the S3 bucket.
    Default: Suspended
    AllowedValues:
      - Enabled
      - Suspended
    ConstraintDescription: Must be Enabled or Suspended.
  TransitionDays:
    Type: Number
    Description: Number of days after which objects are transitioned to Glacier storage.
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 1
  RetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Description: Number of days after which objects are deleted.
    Default: 365000
    MinValue: 1
  KmsMasterKeyId:
    Type: String
    Description: KMS master key ARN or alias for S3 bucket encryption. Defaults to the AWS-managed S3 key.
    Default: "alias/aws/s3"
    AllowedPattern: "^arn:aws:kms:[a-z0-9\\-]+:[0-9]{12}:key\\/[a-f0-9-]+$|^alias/.*$"
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid KMS key ARN or alias.

Resources:
  VPCFlowLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !If
        - HasCustomBucketName
        - !Ref BucketName
        - !Ref "AWS::NoValue"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref KmsMasterKeyId
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: !Ref BucketVersioningStatus
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: TransitionToGlacierAndExpire
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionDays
                StorageClass: GLACIER
            ExpirationInDays: !Ref RetentionDays
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true

  VPCFlowLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref VPCFlowLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowDeliveryLogsServiceWriteWithBucketOwnerFullControl
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub "${VPCFlowLogsBucket.Arn}/*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                s3:x-amz-acl: bucket-owner-full-control

Conditions:
  HasCustomBucketName: !Not
    - !Equals
      - ""
      - !Ref BucketName

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket storing VPC flow logs.
    Value: !Ref VPCFlowLogsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket.
    Value: !GetAtt VPCFlowLogsBucket.Arn

    sa-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0e9ce9f1a1489a0f5
Resources:
  LoggingBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "ssm-logs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
  LoggingBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref LoggingBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSSMLoggingWrite
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt EC2InstanceRole.Arn
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt LoggingBucket.Arn
              - !Sub "${LoggingBucket.Arn}/logs/*"
  EC2InstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SSMInvocationAndLogging
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:SendCommand
                  - ssm:GetCommandInvocation
                  - ssm:DescribeInstanceInformation
                Resource: "*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetBucketLocation
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt LoggingBucket.Arn
                  - !Sub "${LoggingBucket.Arn}/logs/*"
  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2InstanceRole
  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow HTTP and HTTPS traffic
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap
        - RegionMap
        - !Ref "AWS::Region"
        - AMI
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !GetAtt SecurityGroup.GroupId
      KeyName: !If [HasKeyName, !Ref KeyName, !Ref "AWS::NoValue"]
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -e
          yum install -y nginx
          systemctl enable nginx
          systemctl start nginx
          echo "Nginx installed and started."
  NginxInstallAssociation:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Association
    Properties:
      Name: AWS-RunShellScript
      Targets:
        - Key: instanceids
          Values:
            - !Ref EC2Instance
      ScheduleExpression: !Ref SsmSchedule
      Parameters:
        commands:
          - !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash
            set -e
            yum install -y nginx
            systemctl enable nginx
            systemctl start nginx
            echo "Nginx ensured via SSM association."
      OutputLocation:
        BucketName: !Ref LoggingBucket
        KeyPrefix: !Sub "logs/${EC2Instance}/"
      AssociationName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-nginx-install"
      ApplyOnlyAtCronInterval: true
      DocumentVersion: "2"
      MaxErrors: "0"
      MaxConcurrency: "100%"
      SyncCompliance: AUTO
      ComplianceSeverity: MEDIUM

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EC2 instance with tag-driven Nginx installation, SSM automation, centralized logging, and enhanced monitoring.'

Parameters:
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    Description: EC2 instance type
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
  KeyName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Description: Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair to enable SSH access
    Default: ''
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: dev
    Description: Environment tag (e.g., dev, staging, prod)
  Owner:
    Type: String
    Default: cloudformation
    Description: Owner tag for resource attribution

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0b5f4cb456622324d
    us-west-1:
      AMI: ami-05e5f4d464a7e923e
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-03420893622400186
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0aa2b7722dc1b5612
    eu-west-2:
      AMI: ami-00d2141f5aca7a55e
    eu-west-3:
      AMI: ami-049b45bb6634e86e0
    ap-south-1:
      AMI: ami-02ae17502753705ea
    ap-southeast-1:
      AMI: ami-08c40ec9ead489470
    ap-southeast-2:
      AMI: ami-0e4c6f8f5c7e8e3e0
    ap-northeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0dcc6ff895c17708a
    ap-northeast-2:
      AMI: ami-04fd21a17130e5b6c
    sa-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0722212c5c46614e7

Resources:
  LogBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 'nginx-logs-${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: ExpireOldObjects
            Status: Enabled
            ExpirationInDays: 90

  LogBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref LogBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceTLS
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt LogBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${LogBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: false
          - Sid: AllowSSMAndEC2Write
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${LogBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption: AES256

  EC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMFullAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3LogBucketAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetObject
                Resource: !Sub '${LogBucket.Arn}/*'

  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2Role

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Nginx with restricted access
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: SSH access
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityGroup'
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !GetAtt SecurityGroup.GroupId
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 8
            VolumeType: gp3
            Encrypted: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2'
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: InstallNginx
          Value: 'true'
      Monitoring: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -e
          # Ensure latest cloud-init and SSM agent
          yum update -y
          yum install -y https://s3.amazonaws.com/ec2-downloads-windows/SSMAgent/latest/linux_amd64/amazon-ssm-agent.rpm
          systemctl enable --now amazon-ssm-agent
          # Install CloudWatch Agent
          yum install -y amazon-cloudwatch-agent
          # Configure CloudWatch Agent for system and nginx metrics/logs
          cat > /opt/aws/amazon-cloudwatch-agent/bin/config.json <<'EOF'
          {
            "agent": {
              "metrics_collection_interval": 60,
              "run_as_user": "root"
            },
            "metrics": {
              "append_dimensions": {
                "InstanceId": "${InstanceId}"
              },
              "metrics_collected": {
                "cpu": {
                  "measurement": [
                    "cpu_usage_idle",
                    "cpu_usage_iowait",
                    "cpu_usage_user",
                    "cpu_usage_system"
                  ],
                  "totalcpu": true
                },
                "mem": {
                  "measurement": [
                    "mem_used_percent"
                  ]
                },
                "disk": {
                  "measurement": [
                    "used_percent"
                  ],
                  "resources": [
                    "*"
                  ]
                }
              }
            },
            "logs": {
              "logs_collected": {
                "files": {
                  "collect_list": [
                    {
                      "file_path": "/var/log/nginx/*.log",
                      "log_group_name": "/ec2/nginx/access",
                      "timestamp_format": "%d/%b/%Y:%H:%M:%S %z"
                    },
                    {
                      "file_path": "/var/log/nginx/error.log",
                      "log_group_name": "/ec2/nginx/error",
                      "timestamp_format": "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z"
                    },
                    {
                      "file_path": "/var/log/messages",
                      "log_group_name": "/ec2/system/messages",
                      "timestamp_format": "%b %d %H:%M:%S"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              }
            }
          }
          EOF
          /opt/aws/amazon-cloudwatch-agent/bin/amazon-cloudwatch-agent-ctl \
            -a fetch-config \
            -m ec2 \
            -c file:/opt/aws/amazon-cloudwatch-agent/bin/config.json \
            -s
          # Ensure nginx log directories exist
          mkdir -p /var/log/nginx
          # Start nginx via SSM command (tag-driven) will handle installation

  NginxSSMAssociation:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Association
    Properties:
      Name: NginxInstallAssociation
      Targets:
        - Key: tag:InstallNginx
          Values:
            - 'true'
      Parameters:
        commands:
          - !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash
            set -e
            # Install Nginx
            yum install -y nginx
            # Configure Nginx to write access/error logs to S3
            cat > /etc/nginx/conf.d/log-to-s3.conf <<'NGINXEOF'
            access_log /var/log/nginx/access.log;
            error_log /var/log/nginx/error.log;
            NGINXEOF
            # Create log shipping script
            cat > /usr/local/bin/ship-nginx-logs.sh <<'SHIPEOF'
            #!/bin/bash
            INSTANCE_ID=$(curl -s http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/instance-id)
            TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y-%m-%d-%H-%M-%S)
            aws s3 cp /var/log/nginx/access.log ${LogBucket}/nginx/access/${TIMESTAMP}-access.log || true
            aws s3 cp /var/log/nginx/error.log ${LogBucket}/nginx/error/${TIMESTAMP}-error.log || true
            # Truncate local logs after shipping
            > /var/log/nginx/access.log
            > /var/log/nginx/error.log
            SHIPEOF
            chmod +x /usr/local/bin/ship-logs.sh
            # Install AWS CLI if not present
            yum install -y aws-cli
            # Set up cron to ship logs every 5 minutes
            (crontab -l 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'ship-nginx-logs'; echo '*/5 * * * * /usr/local/bin/ship-logs.sh') | crontab -
            # Start and enable Nginx
            systemctl enable --now nginx
            # Create CloudWatch Log Groups
            aws logs create-log-group --log-group-name "/ec2/nginx/access"
            aws logs create_log_group --log-group-name "/ec2/nginx/error"
            # Configure CloudWatch Logs agent for nginx logs
            cat > /opt/aws/amazon-cloudwatch-agent/bin/nginx-config.json <<'CWEOF'
            {
              "logs": {
                "logs_collected": {
                  "files": {
                    "collect_list": [
                      {
                        "file_path": "/var/log/nginx/access.log",
                        "log_group_name": "/ec2/nginx/access",
                        "timestamp_format": "%d/%b/%Y:%H:%M:%S %z"
                      },
                      {
                        "file_path": "/var/log/nginx/error.log",
                        "log_group_name": "/ec2/nginx/error",
                        "timestamp_format": "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                }
              }
            }
            CWEOF
            /opt/aws/amazon-cloudwatch-agent/bin/amazon-cloudwatch-agent-ctl \
              -a update-config \
              -m ec2 \
              -c file:/opt/aws/amazon-cloudwatch-agent/bin/nginx-config.json \
              -s
            # Create CloudWatch Alarms
            aws cloudwatch put-metric-alarm \
              --alarm-name "${AWS::StackName}-High-CPU" \
              --metric-name CPUUtilization \
              --namespace AWS/EC2 \
              --statistic Average \
              --period 300 \
              --evaluation-periods 1 \
              --threshold 80 \n              --comparison-operator GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold \
              --dimensions Name=InstanceId,Value=$(curl -s http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/instance-id) \
              --alarm-description "Alarm when CPU exceeds 80%" \
              --treat-missing-data notBreaching \
              --ok-actions "" \
              --insufficient-data-actions ""
            aws cloudwatch put-metric-alarm \
              --alarm-name "${AWS::StackName}-HTTP-5xx-Errors" \
              --metric-name HTTPCode_ELB_5XX_Count \n              --namespace AWS/ELB \n              --statistic Sum \n              --period 300 \n              --evaluation-periods 1 \n              --threshold 1 \n              --comparison-operator GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold \
              --dimensions Name=LoadBalancerName,Value=$(curl -s http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/instance-id) \n              --alarm-description "Alarm when HTTP 5xx errors occur" \n              --treat-missing-data notBreaching \
              --ok-actions "" \
              --insufficient-data-actions ""

  CloudWatchDashboard:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Dashboard
    Properties:
      DashboardName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Dashboard'
      DashboardBody: !Sub |
        {
          "widgets": [
            {
              "type": "metric",
              "x": 0,
              "y": 0,
              "width": 24,
              "height": 9,
              "properties": {
                "metrics": [
                  [ "AWS/EC2", "CPUUtilization", "InstanceId", "$(curl -s http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/instance-id)" ]
                ],
                "period": 300,
                "stat": "Average",
                "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                "title": "EC2 CPU Utilization"
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "log",
              "x": 0,
              "y": 9,
              "width": 24,
              "height": 6,
              "properties": {
                "query": "fields @timestamp, @message | filter @logGroup like /\\/ec2\\/nginx\\// | sort @timestamp desc | limit 20",
                "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                "title": "Nginx Logs",
                "view": "table"
              }
            }
          ]
        }

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  S3BucketName:
    Description: S3 bucket for centralized logs
    Value: !Ref LogBucket
  CloudWatchDashboardUrl:
    Description: CloudWatch Dashboard URL
    Value: !Sub 'https://${AWS::Region}.console.aws.amazon.com/cloudwatch/home?region=${AWS::Region}#dashboards:name=${CloudWatchDashboard}'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys EC2 with SSM Automation for OS updates, Nginx installation, validation, and centralized logging.

Parameters:
  SSHLocation:
    Description: SSH access CIDR (e.g., 0.0.0.0/0 for open; restrict in production)
    Type: String
    Default: 0.0.0.0/0
  InstanceType:
    Description: EC2 instance type
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t2.micro
  Environment:
    Description: Environment tag value
    Type: String
    Default: dev
  Application:
    Description: Application tag value
    Type: String
    Default: nginx-automation

Resources:
  LogBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application

  LogBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref LogBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: SSMAutomationLogWrite
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt SSMInstanceRole.Arn
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
            Resource: !Sub arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${LogBucket}/*
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption: AES256

  SSMInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SSMLeastPrivilege
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:SendCommand
                  - ssm:DescribeInstanceInformation
                  - ssm:GetCommandInvocation
                  - ssm:ListCommands
                  - ssm:ListCommandInvocations
                Resource: "*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetObject
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt LogBucket.Arn
                  - !Sub ${LogBucket.Arn}/*
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudwatch:PutMetricData
                Resource: "*"

  SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMInstanceRole

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow HTTP and optional SSH
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHLocation
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application

  LatestAmiParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: amzn2-ami-kernel-default-x86_64-ebs
      Type: String

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !GetAtt LatestAmiParam.Value
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 8
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true

  NginxAutomationDocument:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      DocumentType: Automation
      Content:
        schemaVersion: '2.2'
        description: 'OS updates, Nginx install, validation with reboot handling'
        parameters:
          - name: SourceBucket
            type: String
          - name: LogPrefix
            type: String
        mainSteps:
          - name: UpdateOS
            action: aws:runShellScript
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - dnf update -y
                - dnf clean all
            timeoutSeconds: 3600
          - name: CheckPendingReboot
            action: aws:runShellScript
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - |
                  if rpm -q --whatprovides kernel &>/dev/null; then
                    echo "Kernel update detected; scheduling reboot check."
                    if [ -f /var/run/reboot-required ]; then
                      echo "Reboot required."
                      exit 1
                    else
                      echo "No reboot required."
                      exit 0
                    fi
                  else
                    echo "No kernel package found; skipping reboot check."
                    exit 0
                  fi
            timeoutSeconds: 300
          - name: RebootIfRequired
            action: aws:awsReboot
            inputs:
              RebootMode: Immediate
            nextStep: ValidateReboot
            onFailure: Abort
          - name: ValidateReboot
            action: aws:runShellScript
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - echo "Instance rebooted and ready."
            timeoutSeconds: 300
          - name: InstallNginx
            action: aws:runShellScript
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - dnf install -y nginx
                - systemctl enable nginx
                - systemctl start nginx
            timeoutSeconds: 3600
          - name: ValidateWebServer
            action: aws:runShellScript
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost/
                - echo "Validation complete."
            timeoutSeconds: 300
          - name: LogSuccess
            action: aws:runShellScript
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - echo "Automation completed successfully at $(date)" > /tmp/automation.log
                - aws s3 cp /tmp/automation.log s3://{{ SourceBucket }}/{{ LogPrefix }}/automation/$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S).log
            timeoutSeconds: 300

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  LogBucketName:
    Description: S3 bucket for logs
    Value: !Ref LogBucket
  SSMDocumentName:
    Description: SSM Automation document name
    Value: !Ref NginxAutomationDocument

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys an EC2 instance with tag-driven automation for OS updates, Nginx installation, and validation using SSM.

Parameters:
  KeyPairName:
    Description: Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair to enable SSH access
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    ConstraintDescription: Must be the name of an existing EC2 KeyPair.
  InstanceType:
    Description: EC2 instance type
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid EC2 instance type.
  SSHCidrIp:
    Description: The specific admin IP (single CIDR, e.g., 203.0.113.100/32) allowed to SSH to the EC2 instance
    Type: String
    Default: 203.0.113.100/32
    AllowedPattern: "^(?:(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)\\.){3}(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)/(?:3[0-2]|[1-2]?[0-9])$"
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a single CIDR (e.g., 203.0.113.100/32) representing a specific admin IP.

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0b5f10e732d44ff07
    us-west-1:
      AMI: ami-05e594a14b7ebcaa6
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-03470f6ff54a98305
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0aa237145d0554111
    eu-west-2:
      AMI: ami-00d2a2e062720d7e2
    eu-west-3:
      AMI: ami-04ee034567995ac14
    eu-north-1:
      AMI: ami-0e78e478614a5501f
    ap-south-1:
      AMI: ami-09d4af592d2e9952a
    ap-southeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0e78e478614a5501f
    ap-southeast-2:
      AMI: ami-0ebc8839f46c7d637
    ap-northeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0e78e478614a5501f
    ap-northeast-2:
      AMI: ami-0b5f10e732d44ff07
    sa-east-1:
      AMI: ami-07de4231ae1ac5a48
    cn-north-1:
      AMI: ami-0e5fd9b26173a9734

Resources:
  # Security Group allowing HTTP and restricted SSH
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Enable HTTP and restricted SSH access
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: Allow HTTP
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHCidrIp
          Description: Allow SSH

  # IAM Role for EC2 to allow SSM and metadata access
  EC2SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMFullAccess
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonEC2ReadOnlyAccess

  # Instance Profile for the EC2 instance
  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMRole

  # EC2 Instance with tag to trigger automation, IMDSv2, and root encryption
  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref "AWS::Region", AMI]
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !GetAtt InstanceSecurityGroup.GroupId
      KeyName: !Ref KeyPairName
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpTokens: required
        HttpEndpoint: enabled
        HttpProtocolIpv6: disabled
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      Tags:
        - Key: nginx
          Value: true

  # SSM Automation Document for OS updates, Nginx install, and validation
  AutomationDocument:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      Content:
        schemaVersion: '2.2'
        description: >-
          Automates OS updates with reboot checks, installs Nginx,
          starts/enables the service, and validates with curl.
        parameters:
          InstanceIds:
            type: StringList
            description: (Automation target) Comma-separated instance IDs
        mainSteps:
          - name: updatePackages
            action: aws:runShellScript
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - yum update -y
            timeoutSeconds: 600
            cloudWatchLoggingConfig:
              cloudWatchLogGroupName: !Ref AutomationLogGroup
              cloudWatchOutputEnabled: true
          - name: checkAndRebootIfNeeded
            action: aws:runShellScript
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - |
                  if rpm -q --whatprovides kernel &>/dev/null; then
                    needs_reboot=0
                    if [ -f /var/run/reboot-required ]; then
                      needs_reboot=1
                    fi
                    if [ "$(uname -r)" != "$(rpm -q --qf '%{VERSION}-%{RELEASE}.%{ARCH}\n' kernel 2>/dev/null | head -1)" ]; then
                      needs_reboot=1
                    fi
                    if [ $needs_reboot -eq 1 ]; then
                      echo "Reboot required. Initiating reboot."
                      shutdown -r +1 "Reboot initiated by SSM Automation"
                      exit 1
                    fi
                  fi
            timeoutSeconds: 300
            cloudWatchLoggingConfig:
              cloudWatchLogGroupName: !Ref AutomationLogGroup
              cloudWatchOutputEnabled: true
          - name: waitForRebootCompletion
            action: aws:waitForAwsResourceProperty
            inputs:
              Service: ec2
              Api: DescribeInstances
              PropertySelector: '$.Reservations[].Instances[].State.Name'
              DesiredValues:
                - running
              InstanceIds: '{{ InstanceIds }}'
              MaxAttempts: 30
              Delay: 30
            isEnd: false
            maxAttempts: 60
            onFailure: Abort
            cloudWatchLoggingConfig:
              cloudWatchLogGroupName: !Ref AutomationLogGroup
              cloudWatchOutputEnabled: true
          - name: installNginx
            action: aws:runShellScript
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - yum install -y nginx
            timeoutSeconds: 300
            cloudWatchLoggingConfig:
              cloudWatchLogGroupName: !Ref AutomationLogGroup
              cloudWatchOutputEnabled: true
          - name: startAndEnableNginx
            action: aws:runShellScript
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - systemctl start nginx
                - systemctl enable nginx
            timeoutSeconds: 300
            cloudWatchLoggingConfig:
              cloudWatchLogGroupName: !Ref AutomationLogGroup
              cloudWatchOutputEnabled: true
          - name: validateWithCurl
            action: aws:runShellScript
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost
                - echo "Validation completed."
            timeoutSeconds: 300
            cloudWatchLoggingConfig:
              cloudWatchLogGroupName: !Ref AutomationLogGroup
              cloudWatchOutputEnabled: true

  # CloudWatch Log Group for Automation execution logs
  AutomationLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub "/aws/ssm/${AWS::StackName}/automation"
      RetentionInDays: 14

  # CloudWatch Alarm for Automation execution failures
  AutomationFailureAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-AutomationFailures"
      AlarmDescription: Alarm when SSM Automation executions fail
      Namespace: AWS/SSM
      MetricName: AutomationExecutionsFailed
      Dimensions:
        - Name: AutomationDefinitionName
          Value: !Ref AutomationDocument
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 1
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: The Instance ID of the deployed EC2 instance
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  AutomationDocumentName:
    Description: The name of the SSM Automation document
    Value: !Ref AutomationDocument
