final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Production-ready VPC with public/private subnets, internal ALB, ECR, and SSM parameters.

Parameters:
  StackName:
    Type: String
    Default: production-vpc
    Description: Name used for tagging and resource naming.
  SSHCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR range allowed SSH access to the ALB.
  PostgreSQLCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR range allowed PostgreSQL access to backend security group.
  VPCCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC.
  PublicSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR for public subnet in AZ 1.
  PublicSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
    Description: CIDR for public subnet in AZ 2.
  PublicSubnet3Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.3.0/24
    Description: CIDR for public subnet in AZ 3.
  PrivateSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.11.0/24
    Description: CIDR for private subnet in AZ 1.
  PrivateSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.12.0/24
    Description: CIDR for private subnet in AZ 2.
  PrivateSubnet3Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.13.0/24
    Description: CIDR for private subnet in AZ 3.
  ECRRepositoryName:
    Type: String
    Default: app-repository
    Description: Name for the ECR repository.
  KMSKeyDescription:
    Type: String
    Default: ECR encryption key
    Description: Description for the KMS key used by ECR.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VPCCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-vpc"

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-igw"

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-public-subnet-1"

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-public-subnet-2"

  PublicSubnet3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet3Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [2, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-public-subnet-3"

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-public-rt"

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet3RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet3
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  NATGateway1EIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc

  NATGateway2EIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc

  NATGateway3EIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc

  NATGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NATGateway1EIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-nat-1"

  NATGateway2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NATGateway2EIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-nat-2"

  NATGateway3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NATGateway3EIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet3
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-nat-3"

  PrivateRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-private-rt-1"

  PrivateRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway1

  PrivateRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-private-rt-2"

  PrivateRoute2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway2

  PrivateRouteTable3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-private-rt-3"

  PrivateRoute3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable3
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway3

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet1Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-private-subnet-1"

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet2Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-private-subnet-2"

  PrivateSubnet3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet3Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [2, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-private-subnet-3"

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2

  PrivateSubnet3RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet3
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable3

  ALBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for internal ALB
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHCidr
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-sg-alb"

  BackendSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for backend services
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 1
          ToPort: 65535
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 5432
          ToPort: 5432
          CidrIp: !Ref PostgreSQLCidr
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-sg-backend"

  InternalALB:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${StackName}-alb-internal"
      Scheme: internal
      Type: application
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet3
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      DropInvalidHeaderFields: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-alb"

  ALBListener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref InternalALB
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: fixed-response
          FixedResponseConfig:
            ContentType: text/plain
            MessageBody: "Error 400: Bad Request"
            StatusCode: 400

  SelfSignedCertArn:
    Type: AWS::CertificateManager::Certificate
    Properties:
      DomainName: !Sub "${StackName}.internal"
      DomainValidationOptions:
        - DomainName: !Sub "${StackName}.internal"
          ValidationDomain: !Sub "${StackName}.internal"
      SubjectAlternativeNames:
        - !Sub "${StackName}.internal"
      ValidationMethod: DNS

  ECRRepository:
    Type: AWS::ECR::Repository
    Properties:
      RepositoryName: !Ref ECRRepositoryName
      ImageScanningConfiguration:
        ScanOnPush: true
      ImageTagMutability: IMMUTABLE
      EncryptionConfiguration:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KmsKey: !Ref KMSKey
      LifecyclePolicy:
        LifecyclePolicyText: |
          {
            "rules": [
              {
                "rulePriority": 1,
                "description": "Expire images older than 30 days",
                "selection": {
                  "tagStatus": "any",
                  "countType": "sinceImagePushed",
                  "countUnit": "days",
                  "countNumber": 30
                },
                "action": {
                  "type": "expire"
                }
              }
            ]
          }
      RepositoryPolicyText: |
        {
          "Version": "2012-10-17",
          "Statement": [
            {
              "Sid": "AllowECRActions",
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": "*",
              "Action": [
                "ecr:GetDownloadUrlForLayer",
                "ecr:BatchGetImage",
                "ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability",
                "ecr:PutImage",
                "ecr:InitiateLayerUpload",
                "ecr:UploadLayerPart",
                "ecr:CompleteLayerUpload"
              ],
              "Resource": "*"
            }
          ]
        }

  KMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Ref KMSKeyDescription
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Id: key-default-1
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: Allow use of the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: "*"
            Action:
              - "kms:Encrypt"
              - "kms:Decrypt"
              - "kms:ReEncrypt*"
              - "kms:GenerateDataKey*"
              - "kms:DescribeKey"
            Resource: "*"

  ECRIAMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonEC2ContainerRegistryReadOnly
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ECRAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ecr:GetDownloadUrlForLayer
                  - ecr:BatchGetImage
                  - ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability
                  - ecr:PutImage
                  - ecr:InitiateLayerUpload
                  - ecr:UploadLayerPart
                  - ecr:CompleteLayerUpload
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:ecr:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:repository/${ECRRepositoryName}"

  SSMParamVPC:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${StackName}/vpc/id"
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref VPC
      Description: VPC ID

  SSMParamPublicSubnets:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${StackName}/subnets/public/ids"
      Type: String
      Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PublicSubnet1, !Ref PublicSubnet2, !Ref PublicSubnet3]]
      Description: Public subnet IDs

  SSMParamPrivateSubnets:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${StackName}/subnets/private/ids"
      Type: String
      Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PrivateSubnet1, !Ref PrivateSubnet2, !Ref PrivateSubnet3]]
      Description: Private subnet IDs

  SSMParamALBListener:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${StackName}/alb/listener/arn"
      Type: String
      Value: !GetAtt ALBListener.ListenerArn
      Description: ALB Listener ARN

  SSMParamBackendSG:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${StackName}/sg/backend/id"
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref BackendSecurityGroup
      Description: Backend security group ID

  SSMParamALBSG:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${StackName}/sg/alb/id"
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      Description: ALB security group ID

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC

  PublicSubnetIds:
    Description: Public subnet IDs
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PublicSubnet1, !Ref PublicSubnet2, !Ref PublicSubnet3]]

  PrivateSubnetIds:
    Description: Private subnet IDs
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PrivateSubnet1, !Ref PrivateSubnet2, !Ref PrivateSubnet3]]

  ALBListenerArn:
    Description: ALB Listener ARN
    Value: !GetAtt ALBListener.ListenerArn

  ECRRepositoryUri:
    Description: ECR Repository URI
    Value: !GetAtt ECRRepository.RepositoryUri

  SSMParamVPC:
    Description: SSM parameter path for VPC ID
    Value: !Sub "arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/${StackName}/vpc/id"

  SSMParamPublicSubnets:
    Description: SSM parameter path for public subnet IDs
    Value: !Sub "arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/${StackName}/subnets/public/ids"

  SSMParamPrivateSubnets:
    Description: SSM parameter path for private subnet IDs
    Value: !Sub "arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/${StackName}/subnets/private/ids"

  SSMParamALBListener:
    Description: SSM parameter path for ALB listener ARN
    Value: !Sub "arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/${StackName}/alb/listener/arn"

  SSMParamBackendSG:
    Description: SSM parameter path for backend security group ID
    Value: !Sub "arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/${StackName}/sg/backend/id"

  SSMParamALBSG:
    Description: SSM parameter path for ALB security group ID
    Value: !Sub "arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/${StackName}/sg/alb/id"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Serverless pipeline to collect, store, and analyze AWS Organization data for centralized governance and reporting.'

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Description: 'Name for the S3 bucket to store organizational data.'
    MinLength: 3
    MaxLength: 63
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9.-]*[a-z0-9]$'
  BucketTags:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Description: 'Tags to apply to the S3 bucket for cost allocation and governance.'
    Default: ''
  ManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Description: 'AWS Account ID of the Organizations management account.'
    MinLength: 12
    MaxLength: 12
    AllowedPattern: '^\d{12}$'
  AthenaDatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Description: 'Name of the Athena database to catalog organization data.'
    Default: 'managementcur'
    MinLength: 1
    MaxLength: 128
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$'
  KmsKeyArn:
    Type: String
    Description: 'KMS Key ARN for S3 bucket encryption. If empty, AES256 is used.'
    Default: ''

Conditions:
  UseKmsEncryption: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KmsKeyArn, '']]

Resources:
  OrganizationDataBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Ref BucketName
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
                KMSMasterKeyID: !If [UseKmsEncryption, !Ref KmsKeyArn, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
                SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: OrganizationData
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - !If [HasBucketTags, { 'Fn::Join': [':', [!Ref 'AWS::StackName', 'BucketTags']] }, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: OrganizationsReadAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - organizations:DescribeOrganization
                  - organizations:ListAccounts
                  - organizations:ListChildren
                  - organizations:ListParents
                  - organizations:ListOrganizationalUnitsForParent
                  - organizations:ListRoots
                  - organizations:ListTargetsForPolicy
                  - organizations:TagResource
                  - organizations:UntagResource
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: CrossAccountRoleAssumption
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sts:AssumeRole
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${ManagementAccountId}:role/*'
        - PolicyName: LambdaBasicExecution
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'

  LambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-OrganizationDataCollector'
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.14
      Timeout: 300
      MemorySize: 512
      Environment:
        Variables:
          TARGET_S3_BUCKET: !Ref OrganizationDataBucket
          MANAGEMENT_ACCOUNT_ID: !Ref ManagementAccountId
          ATHENA_DATABASE_NAME: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
          INCLUDE_TAGS: !Join [':', !Ref BucketTags]
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import os
          import boto3
          from datetime import datetime

          def handler(event, context):
              organizations = boto3.client('organizations')
              s3 = boto3.client('s3')
              
              bucket = os.environ['TARGET_S3_BUCKET']
              management_account = os.environ['MANAGEMENT_ACCOUNT_ID']
              
              # Get organization
              org = organizations.describe_organization()
              organization_data = {
                  'Organization': org,
                  'Accounts': [],
                  'OrganizationalUnits': [],
                  'Policies': [],
                  'Tags': {}
              }
              
              # List all accounts
              paginator = organizations.get_paginator('list_accounts')
              for page in paginator.paginate():
                  organization_data['Accounts'].extend(page['Accounts'])
              
              # List OUs and roots
              try:
                  if org['Organization']['FeatureSet'] == 'ALL':
                      paginator = organizations.get_paginator('list_organizational_units_for_parent')
                      parent_id = org['Organization']['Roots'][0]['Id']
                      for page in paginator.paginate(ParentId=parent_id):
                          organization_data['OrganizationalUnits'].extend(page['OrganizationalUnits'])
                      
                      # List policies
                      policy_types = ['AISERVICES_OPT_OUT_POLICY', 'BACKUP_POLICY', 'SERVICE_CONTROL_POLICY']
                      for policy_type in policy_types:
                          paginator = organizations.get_paginator('list_policies')
                          for page in paginator.paginate(Scope='ORGANIZATION', PolicyType=policy_type):
                              organization_data['Policies'].extend(page['Policies'])
              except Exception:
                  pass
              
              # Get tags for resources
              resources = []
              for account in organization_data['Accounts']:
                  resources.append({'ResourceId': account['Id'], 'ResourceType': 'ACCOUNT'})
              for ou in organization_data['OrganizationalUnits']:
                  resources.append({'ResourceId': ou['Id'], 'ResourceType': 'ORGANIZATIONAL_UNIT'})
              for root in org['Organization']['Roots']:
                  resources.append({'ResourceId': root['Id'], 'ResourceType': 'ROOT'})
              
              paginator = organizations.get_paginator('list_tags_for_resource')
              for resource in resources:
                  try:
                      tags_resp = paginator.paginate(ResourceId=resource['ResourceId'])
                      for page in tags_resp:
                          organization_data['Tags'][resource['ResourceId']] = page['Tags']
                  except Exception:
                      pass
              
              # Write to S3
              key = f"organization-data/{datetime.utcnow().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}/data.json"
              s3.put_object(
                  Bucket=bucket,
                  Key=key,
                  Body=json.dumps(organization_data, indent=2),
                  ServerSideEncryption='aws:kms' if !Ref UseKmsEncryption == 'true' else 'AES256'
              )
              
              return {'statusCode': 200, 'body': f'Data written to {key}'}

  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref LambdaFunction
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: events.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !GetAtt ScheduleRule.Id

  ScheduleRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WeeklySchedule'
      ScheduleExpression: 'rate(7 days)'
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Id: LambdaTarget
          Arn: !GetAtt LambdaFunction.Arn

  GlueServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: glue.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: GlueS3WriteAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetBucketLocation
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt OrganizationDataBucket.Arn
                  - !Sub '${OrganizationDataBucket.Arn}/*'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSGlueServiceRole

  GlueCrawler:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Crawler
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-OrganizationDataCrawler'
      Role: !GetAtt GlueServiceRole.Arn
      DatabaseName: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
      Targets:
        S3Targets:
          - Path: !Sub 's3://${OrganizationDataBucket}/organization-data/'
      RecrawlPolicy:
        RecrawlBehavior: CRAWL_NEW_FOLDERS_ONLY
      SchemaChangePolicy:
        UpdateBehavior: UPDATE_IN_DATABASE
        DeleteBehavior: LOG
      Configuration: |
        {
          "Version": 1.0,
          "CrawlerOutput": {
            "Partitions": {
              "AddOrUpdateBehavior": "InheritFromTable"
            }
          }
        }

Outputs:
  S3BucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the S3 bucket storing organization data'
    Value: !GetAtt OrganizationDataBucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketArn'
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda function'
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaFunction.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaFunctionArn'
  GlueCrawlerArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Glue crawler'
    Value: !GetAtt GlueCrawler.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-GlueCrawlerArn'
  LambdaExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda execution role'
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaExecutionRoleArn'
  GlueServiceRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Glue service role'
    Value: !GetAtt GlueServiceRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-GlueServiceRoleArn'
  AthenaDatabaseName:
    Description: 'Name of the Athena database'
    Value: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AthenaDatabaseName'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'AWS Amplify Web Application for TodoApp with Production Branch, CI/CD, Security, and Monitoring'

# Parameters for reusability and environment configuration
Parameters:
  AppName:
    Type: String
    Default: TodoApp
    Description: Name of the Amplify App
  RepositoryUrl:
    Type: String
    Default: https://github.com/example/todoapp.git
    Description: Git repository URL (e.g., https://github.com/owner/repo)
    AllowedPattern: ^(https?|git)://.+$
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid HTTP, HTTPS, or SSH Git repository URL.
  DomainName:
    Type: String
    Default: example.com
    Description: Custom domain name for the Amplify app (e.g., example.com)
    AllowedPattern: ^([a-zA-Z0-9]([a-zA-Z0-9\-]{0,61}[a-zA-Z0-9])?\.)+[a-zA-Z]{2,}$
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid domain name (e.g., example.com).
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: Production
    AllowedValues:
      - Development
      - Staging
      - Production
    Description: Deployment environment

# Resources
Resources:
  # Amplify App Resource
  TodoAmplifyApp:
    Type: AWS::Amplify::App
    Properties: 
      Name: !Ref AppName
      Repository: !Ref RepositoryUrl
      Description: 'TodoApp Web Application'
      BuildSpec: |
        version: 1.0
        frontend:
          phases:
            preBuild:
              commands:
                - echo "Installing dependencies..."
                - npm ci
            build:
              commands:
                - echo "Building production bundle..."
                - npm run build
          artifacts:
            baseDirectory: build
            files:
              - '**/*'
          cache:
            paths:
              - node_modules/**/*
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: TodoApp
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  # Production Branch Resource
  ProductionBranch:
    Type: AWS::Amplify::Branch
    Properties: 
      AppId: !GetAtt TodoAmplifyApp.AppId
      BranchName: production
      Description: 'Production branch for TodoApp'
      EnableAutoBuild: true
      Framework: 'React'
      BuildSpec: |
        version: 1.0
        frontend:
          phases:
            preBuild:
              commands:
                - echo "Installing dependencies..."
                - npm ci
            build:
              commands:
                - echo "Building production bundle..."
                - npm run build
          artifacts:
            baseDirectory: build
            files:
              - '**/*'
          cache:
            paths:
              - node_modules/**/*
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: TodoApp
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: BranchType
          Value: Production

  # Custom Domain and SSL Certificate
  AmplifyDomain:
    Type: AWS::Amplify::Domain
    Properties: 
      AppId: !GetAtt TodoAmplifyApp.AppId
      DomainName: !Ref DomainName
      SubDomainSettings:
        - BranchName: production
          Prefix: ''

Outputs:
  AppId:
    Description: Amplify App ID
    Value: !GetAtt TodoAmplifyApp.AppId
  AppArn:
    Description: Amplify App ARN
    Value: !GetAtt TodoAmplifyApp.Arn
  DefaultDomain:
    Description: Default Amplify domain
    Value: !GetAtt TodoAmplifyApp.DefaultDomain
  DomainName:
    Description: Custom domain name configured for the app
    Value: !Ref DomainName

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  Secure multi-AZ VPC with public/private subnets, NAT Gateways, and route tables
  following AWS Well-Architected security best practices.

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC.
  PublicSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for public subnet in us-east-1a.
  PublicSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for public subnet in us-east-1b.
  PrivateSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for private subnet in us-east-1a.
  PrivateSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.3.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for private subnet in us-east-1b.
  CostCenter:
    Type: String
    Default: cost-center-001
    Description: Cost center tag for all resources.
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: production
    Description: Environment tag for all resources.
  Governance:
    Type: String
    Default: governance-compliant
    Description: Governance identifier tag for all resources.

Mappings:
  AZMap:
    us-east-1:
      AZ1: us-east-1a
      AZ2: us-east-1b

Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true

  # Internet Gateway
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public Subnets
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [AZMap, us-east-1, AZ1]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [AZMap, us-east-1, AZ2]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  # Private Subnets
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet1Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [AZMap, us-east-1, AZ1]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet2Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [AZMap, us-east-1, AZ2]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false

  # Elastic IPs for NAT Gateways
  NAT1EIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc

  NAT2EIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc

  # NAT Gateways
  NATGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NAT1EIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1

  NATGateway2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NAT2EIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2

  # Public Route Table
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Private Route Table 1
  PrivateRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PrivateRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway1

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1

  # Private Route Table 2
  PrivateRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PrivateRoute2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway2

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2

  # Tags as separate resources
  VPCNameTag:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Tag
    Properties:
      ResourceArn: !GetAtt VPC.Arn
      Key: Name
      Value: !Sub '${Environment}-vpc'

  VPCCostCenterTag:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Tag
    Properties:
      ResourceArn: !GetAtt VPC.Arn
      Key: CostCenter
      Value: !Ref CostCenter

  VPCTagEnvironment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Tag
    Properties:
      ResourceArn: !GetAtt VPC.Arn
      Key: Environment
      Value: !Ref Environment

  VPCTagGovernance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Tag
    Properties:
      ResourceArn: !GetAtt VPC.Arn
      Key: Governance
      Value: !Ref Governance

  IGWNameTag:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Tag
    Properties:
      ResourceArn: !GetAtt InternetGateway.Arn
      Key: Name
      Value: !Sub '${Environment}-igw'

  IGWCostCenterTag:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Tag
    Properties:
      ResourceArn: !GetAtt InternetGateway.Arn
      Key: CostCenter
      Value: !Ref CostCenter

  IGWEnvironmentTag:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Tag
    Properties:
      ResourceArn: !GetAtt InternetGateway.Arn
      Key: Environment
      Value: !Ref Environment

  IGWGovernanceTag:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Tag
    Properties:
      ResourceArn: !GetAtt InternetGateway.Arn
      Key: Governance
      Value: !Ref Governance

  NAT1EIPNameTag:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Tag
    Properties:
      ResourceArn: !GetAtt NAT1EIP.Arn
      Key: Name
      Value: !Sub '${Environment}-nat-eip-1a'

  NAT1EIPCostCenterTag:

      ResourceArn: !GetAtt NAT1EIP.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Standardized IAM Baseline with Role-Based Access Controls and Cross-Account Trust'

Parameters:
  TrustedIdentityManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Description: 'AWS Account ID of the Identity Management Account trusted to assume roles'
  TrustedToolingManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Description: 'AWS Account ID of the Tooling Management Account trusted to assume roles'
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Description: 'Environment tag value (e.g., dev, staging, prod)'
    Default: prod
  Owner:
    Type: String
    Description: 'Owner tag for cost allocation and governance'
    Default: CloudGovernanceTeam
  Application:
    Type: String
    Description: 'Application tag for resource classification'
    Default: IAMBaseline

Resources:
  # IAM Groups
  PrivilegedAdminGroup:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Group
    Properties:
      GroupName: PrivilegedAdmin
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AdministratorAccess
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application

  RestrictedAdminGroup:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Group
    Properties:
      GroupName: RestrictedAdmin
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application

  IdentityAdminGroup:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Group
    Properties:
      GroupName: IdentityAdmin
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/IAMUserChangePassword
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref Application

  # IAM Roles
  IdentityManagementRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: IdentityManagementRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !Sub arn:aws:iam::${TrustedIdentityManagementAccountId}:root
                - !Sub arn:aws:iam::${TrustedToolingManagementAccountId}:root
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: 'true'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/IAMReadOnlyAccess

  ToolingManagementRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: ToolingManagementRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !Sub arn:aws:iam::${TrustedToolingManagementAccountId}:root
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: 'true'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ViewOnlyAccess

  CloudFormationExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: CloudFormationExecutionRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudformation.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: 'true'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CloudFormationStackManagement
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudformation:ValidateTemplate
                  - cloudformation:CreateStack
                  - cloudformation:UpdateStack
                  - cloudformation:DeleteStack
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStacks
                  - cloudformation:ListStacks
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/${Application}-*/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:GetObjectVersion
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${Application}-templates/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - iam:ListRolePolicies
                  - iam:ListAttachedRolePolicies
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:CreateTags
                  - ec2:DescribeTags
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    ec2:CreateAction: CreateVolume

  StackSetExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: StackSetExecutionRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudformation.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: 'true'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: StackSetOperations
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudformation:CreateStackInstances
                  - cloudformation:UpdateStackInstances
                  - cloudformation:DeleteStackInstances
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStackInstances
                  - cloudformation:ListStackInstances
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStackSet
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStackInstance
                  - cloudformation:ListStackSets
                  - cloudformation:ListStackSetOperations
                  - cloudformation:StopStackSetOperation
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:GetObjectVersion
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${Application}-templates/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - organizations:ListAccounts
                  - organizations:DescribeOrganization
                Resource: '*'

  # Groups Policies
  PrivilegedAdminMfaPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: PrivilegedAdminMfaRequirement
      Groups:
        - !Ref PrivilegedAdminGroup
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action: '*'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: 'true'

  RestrictedAdminMfaPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: RestrictedAdminMfaRequirement
      Groups:
        - !Ref RestrictedAdminGroup
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:Get*
              - iam:List*
              - ec2:Describe*
              - s3:Get*
              - s3:List*
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: 'true'

  IdentityAdminMfaPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: IdentityAdminMfaRequirement
      Groups:
        - !Ref IdentityAdminGroup
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:CreateUser
              - iam:DeleteUser
              - iam:CreateLoginProfile
              - iam:DeleteLoginProfile
              - iam:CreateAccessKey
              - iam:DeleteAccessKey
              - iam:UpdateAccessKey
              - iam:AttachUserPolicy
              - iam:DetachUserPolicy
              - iam:CreateRole
              - iam:DeleteRole
              - iam:AttachRolePolicy
              - iam:DetachRolePolicy
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: 'true'

  # Explicit Deny Policies for Sensitive Operations
  SensitiveOperationsDenyPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: SensitiveOperationsExplicitDeny
      Groups:
        - !Ref PrivilegedAdminGroup
        - !Ref RestrictedAdminGroup
        - !Ref IdentityAdminGroup
      Roles:
        - !Ref IdentityManagementRole
        - !Ref ToolingManagementRole
        - !Ref CloudFormationExecutionRole
        - !Ref StackSetExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - billing:*
              - cloudhsm:*
              - organizations:*
            Resource: '*'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'VPC with Flow Logging to S3 with comprehensive security and configuration'

Parameters:
  VpcCidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: 'CIDR block for the VPC'
  FlowLogPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Optional prefix for flow log files in S3'
  TrafficTypes:
    Type: String
    Default: ALL
    Description: 'Type of traffic to capture (ALL, ACCEPT, REJECT)'
    AllowedValues:
      - ALL
      - ACCEPT
      - REJECT

Resources:
  Vpc:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-vpc-flow-logs-${AWS::StackName}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'

  VpcFlowLogRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC-Flow-Log-Role'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logdelivery.vpc.flowlogs.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: VpcFlowLogPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetBucketLocation
                  - s3:GetBucketAcl
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
                  - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'

  VpcFlowLog:
    Type: AWS::EC2::FlowLog
    Properties:
      ResourceType: VPC
      ResourceId: !Ref Vpc
      TrafficType: !Ref TrafficTypes
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/vpc/${AWS::StackName}'
      LogDestinationType: s3
      LogDestination: !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
      DeliverLogsPermissionArn: !GetAtt VpcFlowLogRole.Arn
      LogFormat: !Sub '${version} ${account-id} ${interface-id} ${srcaddr} ${dstaddr} ${srcport} ${dstport} ${protocol} ${packets} ${bytes} ${start} ${end} ${action} ${log-status} ${FlowLogPrefix}'

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket storing flow logs'
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketName'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Risk Management System for AWS Workloads - Lambda, DynamoDB, SNS with SSM OpsCenter integration'
Metadata:
  AWS::CloudFormation::Interface:
    ParameterGroups:
      - Label:
          default: "Risk Management System Configuration"
        Parameters:
          - WorkloadStackName
          - NotificationEmail
Parameters:
  WorkloadStackName:
    Type: String
    Description: "Name of the stack used for tagging resources"
    Default: "risk-management-stack"
  NotificationEmail:
    Type: String
    Description: "Email address for SNS notifications"
    Default: "admin@example.com"
Resources:
  RiskManagementTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "${WorkloadStackName}-risk-table"
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: workload_id
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: question_id
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: workload_id
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: question_id
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        KMSMasterKeyId: alias/aws/dynamodb
        SSEType: KMS
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref WorkloadStackName

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - lambda.amazonaws.com
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DynamoDBAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:GetItem
                  - dynamodb:PutItem
                  - dynamodb:UpdateItem
                  - dynamodb:DeleteItem
                  - dynamodb:Query
                  - dynamodb:Scan
                Resource: !GetAtt RiskManagementTable.Arn
        - PolicyName: LambdaBasicExecutionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: "*"

  FirstLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${WorkloadStackName}-risk-processor"
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Environment:
        Variables:
          TABLE_NAME: !Ref RiskManagementTable
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import os
          import boto3
          def handler(event, context):
              return {"statusCode": 200, "body": json.dumps("First Lambda processed")}

  SecondLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${WorkloadStackName}-risk-analyzer"
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Environment:
        Variables:
          TABLE_NAME: !Ref RiskManagementTable
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import os
          import boto3
          def handler(event, context):
              return {"statusCode": 200, "body": json.dumps("Second Lambda processed")}

  RiskManagementKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: "Customer-managed KMS key for SNS topic encryption"
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Id: key-default-1
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"

  RiskManagementTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: !Sub "${WorkloadStackName}-risk-alerts"
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref RiskManagementKMSKey
      Subscription:
        - Protocol: email
          Endpoint: !Ref NotificationEmail
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref WorkloadStackName

  RiskManagementTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref RiskManagementTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSSMOpCenterPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: "arn:aws:iam::081369083740:root"
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref RiskManagementTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref "AWS::AccountId"
Outputs:
  RiskManagementTableArn:
    Description: "ARN of the DynamoDB table"
    Value: !GetAtt RiskManagementTable.Arn
  FirstLambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: "ARN of the first Lambda function"
    Value: !GetAtt FirstLambdaFunction.Arn
  SecondLambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: "ARN of the second Lambda function"
    Value: !GetAtt SecondLambdaFunction.Arn
  RiskManagementTopicArn:
    Description: "ARN of the SNS topic"
    Value: !Ref RiskManagementTopic

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Lab environment for testing EC2 instance scheduling automation, including VPC, managed instances, and an admin instance with scheduling tools.

Parameters:
  KeyPairName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Description: Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair to enable SSH access to the admin instance.
    Default: ""
  AdminSourceCidr:
    Type: String
    Description: CIDR block allowed to SSH into the admin instance.
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    AllowedPattern: ^(\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}/\d+$
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid CIDR range.

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c7217cdde317cfec
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0e384edbe98efc7f5
    us-west-1:
      AMI: ami-05e0b7238503507d9
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-0cf487466f613a165
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-09d41ee94a79f8460
    eu-west-2:
      AMI: ami-018663370d5da3843
    eu-west-3:
      AMI: ami-05e25ea2ffc266561
    eu-north-1:
      AMI: ami-05a3838272021a366
    ap-south-1:
      AMI: ami-02cfc6c784224cd70
    ap-southeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0e8a50697e7aaa0a2
    ap-southeast-2:
      AMI: ami-05f26073ccd83f608
    ap-northeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0e12482968884aff7
    ap-northeast-2:
      AMI: ami-0184c8ef743494611
    sa-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0e9a1f02044f98bb0
    ca-central-1:
      AMI: ami-0b18956f
    cn-north-1:
      AMI: ami-0a1f52c6c3b83dc8b
    cn-northwest-1:
      AMI: ami-0a017f59fc3e1416b

Resources:
  # VPC
  LabVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LabVPC"

  # Internet Gateway
  LabInternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LabIGW"

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref LabInternetGateway

  # Public Subnet (MapPublicIpOnLaunch set to false)
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs ""]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet"

  # Network ACL (Permissive but without overly permissive egress)
  LabNetworkACL:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LabNACL"

  InboundNACLRuleAllowAll:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref LabNetworkACL
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0

  # Removed OutboundNACLRuleAllowAll to prevent unrestricted egress

  SubnetNetworkAclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      NetworkAclId: !Ref LabNetworkACL

  # Route Table
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable"

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref LabInternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Security Group for Admin (restricted inbound + egress to specific targets)
  AdminSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for admin instance with restricted inbound access.
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref AdminSourceCidr
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 10.0.1.0/24  # Allow SSH to Lightweight instances
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0   # Allow HTTPS for package installs
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-AdminSG"

  # Security Group for Lightweight Instances (restrict egress)
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for lightweight instances with restricted egress.
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref AdminSecurityGroup  # Allow SSH from Admin
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 10.0.1.0/24  # Allow SSH to Admin
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0   # Allow HTTPS for package installs
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-InstanceSG"

  # IAM Role for Admin Instance
  AdminInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: AdminLambdaCloudFormationPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                  - lambda:ListFunctions
                  - lambda:GetFunction
                  - lambda:CreateFunction
                  - lambda:UpdateFunctionConfiguration
                  - lambda:DeleteFunction
                  - cloudformation:*
                Resource: "*"

  AdminInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref AdminInstanceRole

  # IAM Role for Lightweight Instances
  LightweightInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SSMAndCloudWatchPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:DescribeInstanceInformation
                  - ssm:GetCommandInvocation
                  - ssm:ListCommands
                  - ssm:SendCommand
                  - ssm:StartSession
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: "*"

  LightweightInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref LightweightInstanceRole

  # Admin EC2 Instance with IMDSv2 and encrypted EBS
  AdminInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref "AWS::Region", AMI]
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref AdminInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref AdminSecurityGroup
      KeyName: !Ref KeyPairName
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpTokens: required
        HttpEndpoint: disabled
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 8
            VolumeType: gp3
            Encrypted: true
      Tags:
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          # Install AWS Instance Scheduler CLI (example using pip)
          yum install -y python3-pip
          pip3 install aws-scheduler-cli || echo "Scheduler CLI installation attempted"
          # Ensure SSM Agent is running
          yum install -y amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent

  # Lightweight EC2 Instances with IMDSv2 and encrypted EBS
  LightweightInstance1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref "AWS::Region", AMI]
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref LightweightInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpTokens: required
        HttpEndpoint: disabled
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 8
            VolumeType: gp3
            Encrypted: true
      Tags:
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          yum install -y amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent

  LightweightInstance2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref "AWS::Region", AMI]
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref LightweightInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpTokens: required
        HttpEndpoint: disabled
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 8
            VolumeType: gp3
            Encrypted: true
      Tags:
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          yum install -y amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent

  LightweightInstance3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref "AWS::Region", AMI]
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref LightweightInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpTokens: required
        HttpEndpoint: disabled
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 8
            VolumeType: gp3
            Encrypted: true
      Tags:
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          yum install -y amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent

  LightweightInstance4:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref "AWS::Region", AMI]
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref LightweightInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpTokens: required
        HttpEndpoint: disabled
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 8
            VolumeType: gp3
            Encrypted: true
      Tags:
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          yum install -y amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent

  LightweightInstance5:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref "AWS::Region", AMI]
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref LightweightInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpTokens: required
        HttpEndpoint: disabled
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 8
            VolumeType: gp3
            Encrypted: true
      Tags:
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          yum install -y amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
          systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent

Outputs:
  AdminInstanceId:
    Description: Instance ID of the admin instance
    Value: !Ref AdminInstance

  AdminInstancePrivateIP:
    Description: Private IP address of the admin instance
    Value: !GetAtt AdminInstance.PrivateIp

  LightweightInstanceIds:
    Description: Instance IDs of the five lightweight instances
    Value: !Join [", ", [!Ref LightweightInstance1, !Ref LightweightInstance2, !Ref LightweightInstance3, !Ref LightweightInstance4, !Ref LightweightInstance5]]

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'S3 bucket with SNS event-driven notifications for ObjectCreated events'

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Description: 'Name for the S3 bucket (must be globally unique)'
    Default: 'event-driven-notifications-bucket'

Resources:
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Ref BucketName
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      NotificationConfiguration:
        TopicConfigurations:
          - Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*
            Topic: !Ref NotificationTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: EventDrivenNotifications
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  NotificationTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3-Notifications'
      Subscription: []
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: EventDrivenNotifications
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  SNSPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref NotificationTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowS3Publish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref NotificationTopic
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket'
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketName'

  SNSTopicARN:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS topic for notifications'
    Value: !Ref NotificationTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SNSArn'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'REST API Gateway integrated with SQS for HTTP-based message retrieval'

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: prod
    Description: Environment tag for resource governance
  QueueName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'sqs-message-queue'
    Description: Unique name for the SQS queue
  StageName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'prod'
    Description: API Gateway deployment stage name

Resources:
  SqsQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref QueueName
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref QueueName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  ApiGatewayRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SqsReceiveMessagePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sqs:ReceiveMessage
                  - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
                Resource: !GetAtt SqsQueue.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref QueueName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  ApiGatewayRestApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${QueueName}-api'
      Description: 'API Gateway for SQS message retrieval'
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${QueueName}-api'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  ApiGatewayResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref ApiGatewayRestApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt ApiGatewayRestApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: 'messages'

  ApiGatewayMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref ApiGatewayRestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref ApiGatewayResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      Integration:
        Type: AWS_PROXY
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub
          - 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:sqs:action/ReceiveMessage'
          - {}
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayRole.Arn
        RequestParameters:
          integration.request.querystring.QueueUrl: !Sub "'${SqsQueue.QueueUrl}'"
          integration.request.querystring.WaitTimeSeconds: 'method.request.querystring.WaitTimeSeconds'
          integration.request.querystring.MaxNumberOfMessages: 'method.request.querystring.MaxNumberOfMessages'
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
          - StatusCode: 400
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200
        - StatusCode: 400

  ApiGatewayQueueUrlMock:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref ApiGatewayRestApi
      ResourceId: !GetAtt ApiGatewayRestApi.RootResourceId
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: '{"statusCode": 200}'
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseParameters: {}
          - StatusCode: 400
            ResponseParameters: {}

  ApiGatewayCors:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref ApiGatewayRestApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt ApiGatewayRestApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: 'cors'

  ApiGatewayCorsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref ApiGatewayRestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref ApiGatewayCors
      HttpMethod: OPTIONS
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: '{"statusCode": 200}'
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseParameters:
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: "'*'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "'Content-Type,X-Amz-Date,Authorization,X-Api-Key,X-Amz-Security-Token'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: "'GET,OPTIONS'"
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200
        - ResponseParameters:
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: false
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: false
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: false

Outputs:
  ApiGatewayInvokeUrl:
    Description: 'Invoke URL for the API Gateway endpoint'
    Value: !Sub 'https://${ApiGatewayRestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/${StageName}/messages/'
  QueueName:
    Description: 'Name of the SQS queue'
    Value: !Ref QueueName
  QueueUrl:
    Description: 'URL of the SQS queue'
    Value: !GetAtt SqsQueue.QueueUrl
  ApiGatewayRestApiId:
    Description: 'API Gateway REST API ID'
    Value: !Ref ApiGatewayRestApi
